emergency.title: Initial Triage Assessment
emergency.scenario: A patient arrives at the ED and you need to quickly assess their chief complaint and vital signs.

samplePhrase.en: What is your main problem today?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cuál es su problema principal hoy?

emergency.title: Vital Signs Collection
emergency.scenario: You are measuring a patient's blood pressure, heart rate, respiratory rate, and temperature.

samplePhrase.en: I need to check your blood pressure and heart rate.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito revisar su presión arterial y frecuencia cardíaca.

emergency.title: Airway Assessment
emergency.scenario: A patient is having difficulty breathing and you need to assess their airway patency.

samplePhrase.en: Let me look at your throat. Open your mouth wide.
samplePhrase.es: Déjeme ver su garganta. Abra la boca bien.

emergency.title: Oxygen Administration
emergency.scenario: A patient has low oxygen saturation and you need to apply supplemental oxygen.

samplePhrase.en: I am going to put an oxygen mask on your face to help you breathe.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a ponerle una mascarilla de oxígeno para ayudarle a respirar.

emergency.title: Trauma Survey—Head and Neck
emergency.scenario: A patient has sustained a head injury from a fall and you are performing a rapid trauma assessment.

samplePhrase.en: Keep your head still. Do not move your neck.
samplePhrase.es: Mantenga la cabeza inmóvil. No mueva el cuello.

emergency.title: Trauma Survey—Chest and Abdomen
emergency.scenario: A patient with blunt trauma needs rapid assessment of the chest and abdominal cavity.

samplePhrase.en: I am going to gently press on your abdomen. Tell me if it hurts.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a presionar suavemente su abdomen. Dígame si le duele.

emergency.title: Extremity Trauma Assessment
emergency.scenario: A patient presents with an injured arm or leg and you need to assess for fractures and circulation.

samplePhrase.en: Can you move your fingers and feel them? Is there numbness?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Puede mover los dedos y sentirlos? ¿Hay adormecimiento?

emergency.title: Rapid Stabilization—Hemorrhage Control
emergency.scenario: A patient is bleeding heavily from a laceration and you need to apply direct pressure and a tourniquet.

samplePhrase.en: I am applying pressure to stop the bleeding. Stay still.
samplePhrase.es: Estoy aplicando presión para detener el sangrado. Manténgase quieto.

emergency.title: Rapid Stabilization—Immobilization
emergency.scenario: A patient with a suspected spine or limb injury needs to be immobilized to prevent further damage.

samplePhrase.en: We are going to immobilize your neck and back for safety.
samplePhrase.es: Vamos a inmovilizar su cuello y espalda por seguridad.

emergency.title: Intravenous (IV) Access
emergency.scenario: You are obtaining IV access to administer fluids or medications to a patient.

samplePhrase.en: I need to place an IV line. There will be a small pinch.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito colocar una línea intravenosa. Habrá un pequeño pinchazo.

emergency.title: Pain Assessment and Management
emergency.scenario: A patient is in pain and you need to assess severity and administer analgesics.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of 1 to 10, how much does it hurt?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala de 1 a 10, ¿cuánto le duele?

emergency.title: Chest Pain Evaluation
emergency.scenario: A patient reports acute chest pain and you need to rapidly assess for cardiac etiology.

samplePhrase.en: When did your chest pain start? Is it constant or does it come and go?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cuándo comenzó su dolor de pecho? ¿Es constante o va y viene?

emergency.title: Neurological Assessment
emergency.scenario: A patient may have had a stroke or head injury and you need to perform a rapid neuro exam.

samplePhrase.en: Smile for me. Raise both arms. Can you squeeze my hands?
samplePhrase.es: Sonría. Levante ambos brazos. ¿Puede apretar mis manos?

emergency.title: Medication Administration—Verbal Confirmation
emergency.scenario: You are preparing to administer a medication and need to confirm patient identity and allergies.

samplePhrase.en: What is your full name and date of birth? Do you have any drug allergies?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cuál es su nombre completo y fecha de nacimiento? ¿Tiene alergias a algún medicamento?

emergency.title: Patient Reassurance and Communication
emergency.scenario: A frightened or anxious patient needs calm reassurance and clear explanations during emergency care.

samplePhrase.en: You are going to be okay. I am here with you. Do you have any questions?
samplePhrase.es: Va a estar bien. Estoy aquí con usted. ¿Tiene alguna pregunta?

emergency.title: Penetrating Chest Trauma
emergency.scenario: A patient presents with a stab wound to the anterior chest wall with signs of pneumothorax and hemodynamic instability.

samplePhrase.en: We need to place a chest tube because your lung has collapsed.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos colocar un tubo torácico porque su pulmón se ha colapsado.

emergency.title: Blunt Abdominal Trauma
emergency.scenario: A patient involved in a motor vehicle collision presents with blunt abdominal trauma and suspected intra-abdominal bleeding.

samplePhrase.en: Your abdomen is very tender; we need an ultrasound to check for internal bleeding.
samplePhrase.es: Su abdomen está muy sensible; necesitamos una ecografía para verificar si hay sangrado interno.

emergency.title: Airway Obstruction & Foreign Body
emergency.scenario: A pediatric patient presents with acute upper airway obstruction from a suspected foreign body aspiration with stridor and drooling.

samplePhrase.en: We suspect your child may have swallowed something; we need to look down the throat with a special camera.
samplePhrase.es: Sospechamos que su hijo puede haber tragado algo; necesitamos mirar por la garganta con una cámara especial.

emergency.title: Severe Facial Trauma
emergency.scenario: A patient with severe facial trauma presents with airway compromise, active hemorrhage, and facial fractures affecting airway patency.

samplePhrase.en: We will need to protect your airway and control the bleeding before we can repair your face.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitaremos proteger su vía aérea y controlar el sangrado antes de poder reparar su cara.

emergency.title: Burn Injury Assessment
emergency.scenario: A patient presents with thermal burns affecting 30% of body surface area with partial and full-thickness injuries requiring fluid resuscitation.

samplePhrase.en: You have significant burns; we need to give you large amounts of IV fluids to prevent organ damage.
samplePhrase.es: Tiene quemaduras significativas; necesitamos administrarle grandes cantidades de fluidos intravenosos para prevenir daño orgánico.

emergency.title: Shock & Hypotension
emergency.scenario: A trauma patient presents with signs of hypovolemic shock including tachycardia, hypotension, altered mental status, and poor peripheral perfusion.

samplePhrase.en: Your blood pressure is dangerously low; we must give you blood products and fluids immediately.
samplePhrase.es: Su presión arterial es peligrosamente baja; debemos darle productos sanguíneos y fluidos inmediatamente.

emergency.title: Tension Pneumothorax Emergency
emergency.scenario: A critically ill patient is in respiratory distress with hypotension, JVD, and absent breath sounds requiring immediate needle decompression.

samplePhrase.en: We see collapsed lung pressing on your heart; I am placing a needle in your chest right now to relieve the pressure.
samplePhrase.es: Vemos un pulmón colapsado presionando su corazón; estoy colocando una aguja en su pecho ahora mismo para aliviar la presión.

emergency.title: Cricothyrotomy Procedure
emergency.scenario: A patient with severe facial trauma and complete airway obstruction requires an emergency surgical airway via cricothyrotomy.

samplePhrase.en: Your airway is too damaged to intubate normally; we must make an emergency opening in your neck.
samplePhrase.es: Su vía aérea está demasiado dañada para intubar normalmente; debemos hacer una apertura de emergencia en su cuello.

emergency.title: Resuscitative Hysterotomy (Perimortem C-Section)
emergency.scenario: A pregnant trauma patient in cardiac arrest with effective chest compressions requires emergency cesarean delivery to improve resuscitation.

samplePhrase.en: Because you are very pregnant and your heart has stopped, we must deliver your baby immediately to save your life.
samplePhrase.es: Porque está muy embarazada y su corazón se ha detenido, debemos extraer su bebé inmediatamente para salvar su vida.

emergency.title: Resuscitative Thoracotomy
emergency.scenario: A trauma patient in cardiac arrest with penetrating thoracic injury receives emergency resuscitative thoracotomy with internal cardiac massage.

samplePhrase.en: Your heart has stopped from the trauma; we are opening your chest to massage your heart directly.
samplePhrase.es: Su corazón se ha detenido por el trauma; estamos abriendo su pecho para masajear su corazón directamente.

emergency.title: Rapid Sequence Intubation (RSI)
emergency.scenario: A critically ill patient requires rapid sequence intubation with pre-oxygenation, induction, and immediate endotracheal tube placement.

samplePhrase.en: We are giving you medication to relax your muscles so we can place a breathing tube safely.
samplePhrase.es: Le estamos dando medicamento para relajar sus músculos para que podamos colocar un tubo de respiración de forma segura.

emergency.title: Central Line Placement
emergency.scenario: A critically ill trauma patient requires central venous access for rapid fluid administration and hemodynamic monitoring.

samplePhrase.en: We are placing a large IV line in your neck vein for emergency medications and fluids.
samplePhrase.es: Estamos colocando una línea IV grande en su vena del cuello para medicamentos de emergencia y fluidos.

emergency.title: Pericardiocentesis & Cardiac Tamponade
emergency.scenario: A trauma patient with penetrating chest injury presents with signs of cardiac tamponade requiring emergent pericardiocentesis.

samplePhrase.en: Fluid is compressing your heart; I am placing a needle below your ribcage to drain it.
samplePhrase.es: El líquido está comprimiendo su corazón; estoy colocando una aguja debajo de su caja torácica para drenarlo.

emergency.title: Emergency Thoracostomy (Chest Tube)
emergency.scenario: A patient with pneumothorax or hemothorax requires urgent chest tube placement for drainage and lung re-expansion.

samplePhrase.en: Your collapsed lung needs a chest tube to drain air and allow it to expand again.
samplePhrase.es: Su pulmón colapsado necesita un tubo torácico para drenar aire y permitir que se expanda de nuevo.

emergency.title: FAST Exam & Focused Assessment
emergency.scenario: A trauma patient undergoes the FAST (Focused Assessment with Sonography for Trauma) exam to rapidly detect free fluid in body cavities.

samplePhrase.en: We are using ultrasound to quickly check if you have internal bleeding that needs emergency surgery.
samplePhrase.es: Estamos usando ultrasonido para verificar rápidamente si tiene sangrado interno que necesita cirugía de emergencia.

nursing.title: Initial Patient Assessment
nursing.scenario: A nurse greets a Spanish-speaking patient upon admission and begins collecting vital signs and basic health information.

samplePhrase.en: I need to check your vital signs now.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito revisar sus signos vitales ahora.

nursing.title: Assessing Pain
nursing.scenario: A nurse evaluates a patient's pain using a pain scale and asks about pain location and characteristics.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of 0 to 10, how much pain are you experiencing?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala de 0 a 10, ¿cuánto dolor tiene?

nursing.title: Respiratory Assessment
nursing.scenario: A nurse assesses a patient's breathing and lung sounds using a stethoscope and asks about respiratory symptoms.

samplePhrase.en: Take a deep breath in through your nose and out through your mouth.
samplePhrase.es: Respire profundamente por la nariz y exhale por la boca.

nursing.title: Cardiac Assessment
nursing.scenario: A nurse examines a patient's heart, checks for abnormal rhythms, and asks about cardiac symptoms.

samplePhrase.en: Have you experienced chest pain or pressure recently?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Ha experimentado dolor o presión en el pecho recientemente?

nursing.title: Abdominal Assessment
nursing.scenario: A nurse palpates the abdomen and asks about gastrointestinal symptoms and bowel function.

samplePhrase.en: Tell me about any stomach pain or discomfort you are having.
samplePhrase.es: Cuénteme sobre cualquier dolor o molestia estomacal que tenga.

nursing.title: Medication Administration: Oral Medications
nursing.scenario: A nurse prepares and administers oral medications to a patient, explaining the purpose and side effects.

samplePhrase.en: Take this medication twice a day with a full glass of water.
samplePhrase.es: Tome este medicamento dos veces al día con un vaso lleno de agua.

nursing.title: Medication Administration: Injections
nursing.scenario: A nurse prepares to administer an injection (IM, SC, or IV) and explains the procedure to the patient.

vocab.es: dolor en el sitio de inyección

samplePhrase.en: I am going to give you an injection in your arm. This may sting slightly.
samplePhrase.es: Le voy a poner una inyección en el brazo. Esto puede picar un poco.

nursing.title: Medication Administration: Intravenous Medications
nursing.scenario: A nurse administers intravenous medications through an existing IV line and monitors for adverse reactions.

samplePhrase.en: I am giving you medication through your IV line. Tell me if you feel any burning or discomfort.
samplePhrase.es: Le estoy administrando medicamento a través de su línea intravenosa. Dígame si siente ardor o molestia.

nursing.title: Wound Assessment and Cleansing
nursing.scenario: A nurse assesses a patient's wound, describes its characteristics, and cleanses it using appropriate technique.

samplePhrase.en: I need to clean your wound and change the dressing. This should not hurt.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito limpiar su herida y cambiar el vendaje. Esto no debería doler.

nursing.title: Wound Dressing and Bandaging
nursing.scenario: A nurse applies and secures appropriate dressing to a wound and provides wound care instructions to the patient.

samplePhrase.en: Keep the dressing clean and dry until your next appointment.
samplePhrase.es: Mantenga el vendaje limpio y seco hasta su próxima cita.

nursing.title: IV Access: Peripheral Line Insertion
nursing.scenario: A nurse inserts a peripheral IV line, explains the procedure, and secures the line with appropriate dressing.

samplePhrase.en: I am going to place an IV line in your arm. You may feel a small pinch.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a colocar una línea intravenosa en su brazo. Puede sentir un pequeño pinchazo.

nursing.title: IV Access: Monitoring and Maintenance
nursing.scenario: A nurse monitors an IV line for complications, assesses the site regularly, and performs routine maintenance.

vocab.es: dolor en el sitio de inserción

samplePhrase.en: I am checking your IV line to make sure it is working properly.
samplePhrase.es: Estoy revisando su línea intravenosa para asegurarme de que funcione correctamente.

nursing.title: Patient Communication: Informed Consent
nursing.scenario: A nurse explains a medical procedure, potential risks and benefits, and obtains verbal or written consent from a Spanish-speaking patient.

samplePhrase.en: Do you understand the procedure and do you have any questions before we proceed?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Entiende el procedimiento y tiene alguna pregunta antes de que procedamos?

nursing.title: Patient Communication: Discharge Instructions
nursing.scenario: A nurse provides discharge instructions to a patient, reviews medications, activity restrictions, and follow-up care.

samplePhrase.en: Before you leave, I need to review your discharge instructions and medications with you.
samplePhrase.es: Antes de irse, necesito revisar sus instrucciones de alta y medicamentos con usted.

nursing.title: Documentation: Clinical Notes and Patient Records
nursing.scenario: A nurse documents patient assessments, interventions, and patient responses in the electronic health record using appropriate medical terminology.

samplePhrase.en: I am documenting your vital signs and assessment in your medical record.
samplePhrase.es: Estoy registrando sus signos vitales y evaluación en su historial médico.

nursing.title: Assessing Pain Severity
nursing.scenario: Nurse evaluates a patient's pain level using a standardized scale before administering analgesics.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of 1 to 10, how severe is your pain right now?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala del 1 al 10, ¿qué tan severo es su dolor en este momento?

nursing.title: Respiratory Assessment
nursing.scenario: Nurse assesses patient's breathing pattern, oxygen saturation, and respiratory distress.

samplePhrase.en: I'm placing an oxygen mask on your face to help you breathe easier.
samplePhrase.es: Le voy a colocar una mascarilla de oxígeno en la cara para ayudarle a respirar mejor.

nursing.title: Cardiovascular Assessment
nursing.scenario: Nurse evaluates heart rate, blood pressure, and signs of circulation problems.

samplePhrase.en: Your blood pressure is elevated; we need to monitor your heart rate carefully.
samplePhrase.es: Su presión arterial está elevada; necesitamos monitorear cuidadosamente su frecuencia cardíaca.

nursing.title: Gastrointestinal Assessment
nursing.scenario: Nurse assesses patient's appetite, nausea, vomiting, and bowel function.

samplePhrase.en: Have you experienced any nausea or vomiting since your last meal?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Ha experimentado alguna náusea o vómito desde su última comida?

nursing.title: Neurological Assessment
nursing.scenario: Nurse checks patient's mental status, orientation, and neurological reflexes.

samplePhrase.en: I'm going to ask you some questions to check your memory and alertness.
samplePhrase.es: Le voy a hacer algunas preguntas para verificar su memoria y estado de alerta.

nursing.title: IV Line Insertion
nursing.scenario: Nurse inserts a peripheral IV catheter and explains the procedure to the patient.

samplePhrase.en: I'm going to insert an IV line into your arm to give you fluids and medications.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a insertar una línea IV en su brazo para darle fluidos y medicamentos.

nursing.title: IV Fluid Administration
nursing.scenario: Nurse sets up IV fluids, monitors infusion rate, and checks for complications.

samplePhrase.en: I'm adjusting your IV fluid rate to ensure proper hydration.
samplePhrase.es: Estoy ajustando la velocidad de su fluido IV para garantizar una hidratación adecuada.

nursing.title: Intramuscular Injection
nursing.scenario: Nurse administers an IM injection and instructs patient on what to expect.

samplePhrase.en: I'm giving you an injection in your upper arm muscle; you may feel slight pressure.
samplePhrase.es: Le estoy dando una inyección en el músculo del brazo superior; puede sentir una ligera presión.

nursing.title: Oral Medication Administration
nursing.scenario: Nurse administers oral medications and verifies patient understanding of purpose.

samplePhrase.en: Take this medication with food and drink a full glass of water.
samplePhrase.es: Tome este medicamento con alimentos y beba un vaso lleno de agua.

nursing.title: Wound Assessment and Cleaning
nursing.scenario: Nurse examines a surgical or traumatic wound for signs of infection and performs cleaning.

samplePhrase.en: I'm going to clean your wound with sterile solution to prevent infection.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a limpiar su herida con solución estéril para prevenir la infección.

nursing.title: Dressing Changes
nursing.scenario: Nurse removes old dressing, assesses wound, and applies new sterile dressing.

samplePhrase.en: I'm removing your old dressing carefully and will apply a fresh, clean one.
samplePhrase.es: Estoy removiendo cuidadosamente su vendaje viejo y aplicaré uno nuevo y limpio.

nursing.title: Pressure Injury Prevention
nursing.scenario: Nurse assesses pressure injury risk and implements prevention measures for immobile patients.

samplePhrase.en: We need to reposition you every two hours to prevent pressure sores.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos reposicionarlo cada dos horas para prevenir úlceras por presión.

nursing.title: Catheter Care and Monitoring
nursing.scenario: Nurse maintains urinary catheter, monitors for infection, and documents output.

samplePhrase.en: Your catheter collects your urine in this bag; we monitor the amount and appearance.
samplePhrase.es: Su catéter recolecta su orina en esta bolsa; monitoreamos la cantidad y la apariencia.

nursing.title: Communication with Non-English Speakers
nursing.scenario: Nurse uses interpreters or translation tools to communicate complex medical information.

samplePhrase.en: I'm going to use an interpreter to make sure you understand the procedure.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a usar un intérprete para asegurarme de que entienda el procedimiento.

nursing.title: Documentation and Patient Records
nursing.scenario: Nurse documents vital signs, assessment findings, medications, and interventions in patient chart.

samplePhrase.en: I'm documenting your vital signs and assessment results in your medical record.
samplePhrase.es: Estoy documentando sus signos vitales y resultados de evaluación en su historia clínica.

orthopedics.title: Initial Fracture Assessment
orthopedics.scenario: A patient arrives at the emergency department with a suspected arm fracture and needs initial evaluation.

samplePhrase.en: I need to examine your arm and take an X-ray to see if there is a fracture.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito examinar su brazo y tomar una radiografía para ver si hay una fractura.

orthopedics.title: Fracture Type Classification
orthopedics.scenario: The physician must explain to the patient what type of fracture they have sustained.

samplePhrase.en: You have a displaced fracture, which means the bone pieces are out of alignment and we will need surgery.
samplePhrase.es: Tiene una fractura desplazada, lo que significa que los fragmentos óseos están desalineados y necesitaremos cirugía.

orthopedics.title: Joint Assessment: Range of Motion
orthopedics.scenario: A clinician assesses the patient's range of motion in an injured joint to determine mobility limitations.

samplePhrase.en: Let me test your range of motion by asking you to move your shoulder in different directions.
samplePhrase.es: Déjeme probar su amplitud de movimiento pidiéndole que mueva el hombro en diferentes direcciones.

orthopedics.title: Joint Swelling and Inflammation
orthopedics.scenario: The nurse evaluates swelling and inflammation in a patient's knee joint after injury.

samplePhrase.en: Your knee has significant swelling and is warm to the touch. We will apply ice and compression to reduce the inflammation.
samplePhrase.es: Su rodilla tiene inflamación significativa y está caliente al tacto. Aplicaremos hielo y compresión para reducir la inflamación.

orthopedics.title: Casting: Application and Care
orthopedics.scenario: A clinician explains to a patient how a cast will be applied and how to care for it at home.

samplePhrase.en: We will apply a fiberglass cast to immobilize your fracture. You must keep it dry and avoid scratching underneath.
samplePhrase.es: Aplicaremos un yeso de fibra de vidrio para inmovilizar su fractura. Debe mantenerlo seco y evitar rascarse debajo.

orthopedics.title: Post-Operative Recovery: First 24 Hours
orthopedics.scenario: A nurse provides immediate post-operative instructions to a patient who just had orthopedic surgery.

samplePhrase.en: You are in the recovery room now. It is normal to feel groggy from the anesthesia. We will monitor your pain and give you medication as needed.
samplePhrase.es: Está en la sala de recuperación ahora. Es normal sentirse aturdido por la anestesia. Monitorearemos su dolor y le daremos medicamento según sea necesario.

orthopedics.title: Post-Operative Wound Management
orthopedics.scenario: A clinician teaches a patient how to care for their surgical wound at home during recovery.

samplePhrase.en: Clean the incision gently with soap and water, then apply antibiotic ointment and cover it with a clean bandage.
samplePhrase.es: Limpie la incisión suavemente con agua y jabón, luego aplique ungüento antibiótico y cúbrala con un vendaje limpio.

orthopedics.title: Mobility Assessment: Weight-Bearing Status
orthopedics.scenario: A physical therapist evaluates whether a patient can bear weight on a leg after lower extremity surgery.

samplePhrase.en: For the next two weeks, you are non-weight-bearing on this leg. You will use crutches and we will teach you proper technique.
samplePhrase.es: Durante las próximas dos semanas, no puede cargar peso en esta pierna. Usará muletas y le enseñaremos la técnica correcta.

orthopedics.title: Physical Therapy: Mobility Exercises
orthopedics.scenario: A therapist instructs a patient on specific mobility exercises to restore function after surgery.

samplePhrase.en: Perform these ankle circles ten times, three times per day. You should feel a gentle stretch but no sharp pain.
samplePhrase.es: Realice estos círculos con el tobillo diez veces, tres veces al día. Debe sentir un estiramiento suave pero sin dolor agudo.

orthopedics.title: Surgical Planning: Pre-Operative Consultation
orthopedics.scenario: A surgeon meets with a patient to discuss surgical options and plan the upcoming orthopedic procedure.

samplePhrase.en: We will perform open reduction and internal fixation using a plate and screws to stabilize your fracture.
samplePhrase.es: Realizaremos una reducción abierta y fijación interna utilizando una placa y tornillos para estabilizar su fractura.

orthopedics.title: Range of Motion: Passive vs. Active
orthopedics.scenario: A therapist explains the difference between passive and active range of motion exercises during rehabilitation.

samplePhrase.en: First, I will move your shoulder passively. Then, you will try to move it yourself while I provide gentle resistance.
samplePhrase.es: Primero, moveré su hombro de forma pasiva. Luego, intentará moverlo usted mismo mientras proporciono una resistencia suave.

orthopedics.title: Pain Management: Post-Operative
orthopedics.scenario: A nurse assesses pain levels and adjusts medication management during post-operative recovery.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of zero to ten, where ten is the worst pain, how much pain do you have right now?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala de cero a diez, donde diez es el peor dolor, ¿cuánto dolor tiene ahora?

orthopedics.title: Cast Removal and Transition
orthopedics.scenario: A clinician removes a patient's cast and discusses the transition to rehabilitation without immobilization.

samplePhrase.en: Your cast is coming off today. The skin underneath may be sensitive and the arm will feel weak. This is normal and will improve with rehabilitation.
samplePhrase.es: Su yeso se quitará hoy. La piel debajo puede estar sensible y el brazo se sentirá débil. Esto es normal y mejorará con la rehabilitación.

orthopedics.title: Joint Stability Assessment
orthopedics.scenario: An orthopedic clinician performs special tests to assess stability in a damaged joint, such as the knee.

samplePhrase.en: I am going to perform the anterior drawer test to check if your anterior cruciate ligament is intact.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a realizar la prueba del cajón anterior para verificar si su ligamento cruzado anterior está intacto.

orthopedics.title: Rehabilitation Milestones and Return to Function
orthopedics.scenario: A therapist discusses recovery milestones and goals for returning to normal activities after orthopedic injury.

samplePhrase.en: Your strength is now at eighty percent. In two weeks, if you continue improving, you may be cleared to return to light work activities.
samplePhrase.es: Su fuerza está ahora al ochenta por ciento. En dos semanas, si continúa mejorando, puede ser autorizado a regresar a actividades de trabajo ligero.

orthopedics.title: Diagnosing Fracture Types
orthopedics.scenario: You are explaining different types of fractures to a Spanish-speaking patient who has suffered a bone injury.

samplePhrase.en: Based on the X-ray, you have a displaced fracture that will need surgery.
samplePhrase.es: Según la radiografía, tiene una fractura desplazada que necesitará cirugía.

orthopedics.title: Initial Fracture Assessment
orthopedics.scenario: You are performing initial examination and documentation of a patient's acute fracture.

samplePhrase.en: I am checking your pulses to make sure blood flow is normal below the fracture.
samplePhrase.es: Estoy verificando sus pulsos para asegurar que el flujo de sangre es normal debajo de la fractura.

orthopedics.title: Casting and Immobilization
orthopedics.scenario: You are explaining casting options and the casting process to a patient with a stable fracture.

samplePhrase.en: We will apply a fiberglass cast that you will wear for six weeks.
samplePhrase.es: Aplicaremos un yeso de fibra de vidrio que usará durante seis semanas.

orthopedics.title: Cast Care Instructions
orthopedics.scenario: You are providing detailed home care instructions to a patient with a new cast.

samplePhrase.en: Do not get your cast wet, and if you experience numbness or increased swelling, call us immediately.
samplePhrase.es: No moje su yeso, y si experimenta entumecimiento o hinchazón aumentada, llámenos inmediatamente.

orthopedics.title: Surgical Planning Discussion
orthopedics.scenario: You are meeting with a patient to discuss operative intervention options for their fracture.

samplePhrase.en: Your fracture requires surgery; we will use internal fixation with plates and screws to stabilize the bone.
samplePhrase.es: Su fractura requiere cirugía; usaremos fijación interna con placas y tornillos para estabilizar el hueso.

orthopedics.title: Pre-operative Preparation
orthopedics.scenario: You are preparing a patient for surgery the following day, reviewing final instructions.

samplePhrase.en: You must not eat or drink anything after midnight tonight, and stop taking your blood thinner medication today.
samplePhrase.es: No debe comer ni beber nada después de la medianoche de esta noche, y deje de tomar su medicamento anticoagulante hoy.

orthopedics.title: Immediate Post-operative Assessment
orthopedics.scenario: You are evaluating a patient in the recovery room following fracture surgery.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of zero to ten, how much pain are you experiencing right now?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala de cero a diez, ¿cuánto dolor está experimentando en este momento?

orthopedics.title: Post-operative Pain Management
orthopedics.scenario: You are managing a patient's pain in the immediate post-operative period.

samplePhrase.en: I am giving you pain medication through your IV to help control discomfort.
samplePhrase.es: Le estoy administrando medicamento para el dolor a través de su IV para ayudar a controlar el malestar.

orthopedics.title: Wound Care and Infection Prevention
orthopedics.scenario: You are instructing a patient on post-operative wound care at home.

samplePhrase.en: Change the dressing daily and watch for signs of infection like fever, redness, or pus.
samplePhrase.es: Cambie el vendaje diariamente y vigile signos de infección como fiebre, enrojecimiento o pus.

orthopedics.title: Early Mobilization and Rehabilitation
orthopedics.scenario: You are beginning rehabilitation protocol with a post-operative patient.

samplePhrase.en: We will start with gentle passive range of motion exercises to prevent stiffness.
samplePhrase.es: Comenzaremos con ejercicios suaves de rango de movimiento pasivo para prevenir rigidez.

orthopedics.title: Assessing and Improving Range of Motion
orthopedics.scenario: You are performing range of motion assessment and prescribing mobility goals.

samplePhrase.en: Your knee flexion is at eighty degrees; let's work to increase it to one hundred twenty degrees.
samplePhrase.es: Su flexión de rodilla está en ochenta grados; trabajemos para aumentarla a ciento veinte grados.

orthopedics.title: Joint Assessment Examination
orthopedics.scenario: You are performing comprehensive joint assessment on a post-operative patient.

samplePhrase.en: I am testing your knee stability; tell me if you feel any pain or instability.
samplePhrase.es: Estoy probando la estabilidad de su rodilla; dígame si siente algún dolor o inestabilidad.

orthopedics.title: Progression of Weight Bearing
orthopedics.scenario: You are advancing a patient's weight-bearing status during recovery.

vocab.es: cincuenta por ciento de soporte de peso

samplePhrase.en: You may now progress to fifty percent weight bearing as tolerated; use your crutches for support.
samplePhrase.es: Ahora puede progresar al cincuenta por ciento de soporte de peso según tolere; use sus muletas para apoyo.

orthopedics.title: Strength Training and Advanced Rehabilitation
orthopedics.scenario: You are prescribing advanced strengthening exercises for a patient nearing discharge.

samplePhrase.en: Use this resistance band three times daily to strengthen your leg muscles.
samplePhrase.es: Use esta banda de resistencia tres veces al día para fortalecer los músculos de su pierna.

orthopedics.title: Return to Activity and Discharge Planning
orthopedics.scenario: You are planning discharge and discussing return-to-work or return-to-sport timeline.

vocab.es: programa de ejercicio en el hogar

samplePhrase.en: Most patients return to full activity within three to six months; we will monitor your progress at your follow-up visits.
samplePhrase.es: La mayoría de los pacientes regresan a la actividad completa dentro de tres a seis meses; monitorizaremos su progreso en sus citas de seguimiento.

family-medicine.title: Vital Signs Assessment
family-medicine.scenario: A healthcare worker measures blood pressure, temperature, and weight during a wellness visit.

samplePhrase.en: I'm going to check your blood pressure now. Please sit still.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a revisar su presión arterial ahora. Por favor, quédese quieto.

family-medicine.title: Chief Complaint and Symptoms
family-medicine.scenario: A clinician asks a patient about their main health concern and current symptoms.

samplePhrase.en: Tell me about your symptoms. When did they start?
samplePhrase.es: Cuénteme sobre sus síntomas. ¿Cuándo empezaron?

family-medicine.title: Diabetes Management
family-medicine.scenario: A clinician discusses blood sugar control and diabetes care with a patient at a chronic disease management visit.

samplePhrase.en: Are you checking your blood sugar regularly at home?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Está verificando su glucosa regularmente en casa?

family-medicine.title: Hypertension Counseling
family-medicine.scenario: A clinician educates a patient about high blood pressure and lifestyle modifications.

samplePhrase.en: We need to lower your salt intake and increase physical activity.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos reducir el consumo de sal e incrementar la actividad física.

family-medicine.title: Prescription Explanation
family-medicine.scenario: A clinician explains how to take a new medication to a patient.

samplePhrase.en: Take one tablet twice daily with food. Do not skip doses.
samplePhrase.es: Tome una tableta dos veces al día con comida. No omita las dosis.

family-medicine.title: Medical History Collection
family-medicine.scenario: A clinician gathers information about a patient's past medical conditions and surgeries.

samplePhrase.en: Have you ever had surgery or been hospitalized?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Alguna vez ha tenido una cirugía o ha sido hospitalizado?

family-medicine.title: Preventive Care and Screenings
family-medicine.scenario: A clinician discusses preventive health measures and cancer screenings with a patient.

samplePhrase.en: It's important to get screened regularly to detect problems early.
samplePhrase.es: Es importante realizarse exámenes de detección regularmente para identificar problemas temprano.

family-medicine.title: Medication Side Effects
family-medicine.scenario: A patient reports an adverse reaction to medication, and the clinician documents and responds.

samplePhrase.en: If you experience a rash or difficulty breathing, stop the medication and call us right away.
samplePhrase.es: Si experimenta sarpullido o dificultad para respirar, deje de tomar el medicamento y llámenos inmediatamente.

family-medicine.title: Referral to Specialist
family-medicine.scenario: A primary care clinician refers a patient to a specialist and explains the next steps.

samplePhrase.en: I'm referring you to a cardiologist. They will contact you to schedule an appointment.
samplePhrase.es: Lo estoy refiriendo a un cardiólogo. Ellos lo contactarán para programar una cita.

family-medicine.title: Lifestyle and Diet Counseling
family-medicine.scenario: A clinician provides guidance on nutrition and physical activity for weight management.

samplePhrase.en: Try to eat more vegetables and fruits, and aim for 30 minutes of exercise daily.
samplePhrase.es: Intente comer más verduras y frutas, y procure hacer 30 minutos de ejercicio diariamente.

family-medicine.title: Mental Health Screening
family-medicine.scenario: A clinician asks about depression, anxiety, and stress during a wellness visit.

samplePhrase.en: How is your mood? Are you feeling sad or worried lately?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cómo está su estado de ánimo? ¿Se ha sentido triste o preocupado últimamente?

family-medicine.title: Chronic Pain Management
family-medicine.scenario: A clinician discusses pain control and treatment options with a patient experiencing chronic pain.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of 1 to 10, how severe is your pain?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala del 1 al 10, ¿cuán grave es su dolor?

family-medicine.title: Medication Adherence
family-medicine.scenario: A clinician addresses a patient's concerns about taking medications consistently.

samplePhrase.en: Taking your medication every day is essential for managing your condition.
samplePhrase.es: Tomar su medicamento cada día es esencial para controlar su condición.

family-medicine.title: Smoking Cessation Counseling
family-medicine.scenario: A clinician discusses smoking cessation options and resources with a patient who smokes.

samplePhrase.en: Quitting smoking is one of the best things you can do for your health. Would you like to discuss options?
samplePhrase.es: Dejar de fumar es una de las mejores cosas que puede hacer por su salud. ¿Le gustaría discutir las opciones?

family-medicine.title: Follow-up Appointment Scheduling
family-medicine.scenario: A clinician concludes a visit by scheduling a follow-up appointment and summarizing key points.

samplePhrase.en: Let's schedule a follow-up visit in three months. Do you have any questions before you leave?
samplePhrase.es: Programemos una cita de seguimiento en tres meses. ¿Tiene alguna pregunta antes de irse?

family-medicine.title: Annual Physical Exam
family-medicine.scenario: Conducting a comprehensive wellness visit for preventive care and health maintenance.

samplePhrase.en: Let's do your annual physical today to make sure everything is healthy.
samplePhrase.es: Hoy vamos a hacer su examen físico anual para asegurar que todo esté saludable.

family-medicine.title: Hypertension Management
family-medicine.scenario: Managing and monitoring high blood pressure in a chronic disease follow-up visit.

samplePhrase.en: Your blood pressure is still high; we may need to adjust your medication.
samplePhrase.es: Su presión arterial sigue alta; es posible que necesitemos ajustar su medicamento.

family-medicine.title: Diabetes Type 2 Follow-up
family-medicine.scenario: Monitoring glucose control and reviewing lifestyle modifications for a diabetic patient.

samplePhrase.en: Your A1C is at 7.8; let's work on better blood sugar control through diet and exercise.
samplePhrase.es: Su A1C está en 7.8; trabajemos en un mejor control del azúcar mediante la dieta y el ejercicio.

family-medicine.title: Asthma Action Plan
family-medicine.scenario: Creating and reviewing an asthma management plan with a chronic asthma patient.

vocab.es: plan de acción para el asma

samplePhrase.en: Use your rescue inhaler when you have sudden shortness of breath, and your maintenance inhaler every day.
samplePhrase.es: Use su inhalador de rescate cuando tenga falta de aliento repentina, e inhalador de mantenimiento todos los días.

family-medicine.title: Cholesterol Management
family-medicine.scenario: Reviewing lipid panel results and prescribing statin therapy for cardiovascular prevention.

samplePhrase.en: Your LDL cholesterol is elevated; I'm starting you on a statin to reduce your heart disease risk.
samplePhrase.es: Su colesterol LDL está elevado; le voy a iniciar una estatina para reducir su riesgo de enfermedad cardíaca.

family-medicine.title: Prescription Writing and Explanation
family-medicine.scenario: Writing a prescription and explaining medication instructions clearly to the patient.

samplePhrase.en: Take one tablet by mouth twice daily with meals, and you can get three refills at the pharmacy.
samplePhrase.es: Tome una tableta por vía oral dos veces al día con las comidas, y puede obtener tres recargas en la farmacia.

family-medicine.title: Medication Side Effects Discussion
family-medicine.scenario: Discussing potential side effects and what to watch for with a new medication.

samplePhrase.en: Common side effects include dizziness and headache, which usually go away after a few days.
samplePhrase.es: Los efectos secundarios comunes incluyen mareos y dolor de cabeza, que generalmente desaparecen después de algunos días.

family-medicine.title: Referral to Specialist
family-medicine.scenario: Referring a patient to a specialist and explaining the reason for the referral.

samplePhrase.en: I'm referring you to a cardiologist because we need to check your heart more closely.
samplePhrase.es: Lo estoy derivando a un cardiólogo porque necesitamos revisar su corazón más de cerca.

family-medicine.title: Cancer Screening and Prevention
family-medicine.scenario: Discussing cancer screening guidelines and preventive measures during a wellness visit.

samplePhrase.en: At your age, you need a mammogram every two years for breast cancer screening.
samplePhrase.es: A su edad, necesita una mamografía cada dos años para el detección del cáncer de mama.

family-medicine.title: Immunization Updates
family-medicine.scenario: Updating patient vaccinations and discussing age-appropriate vaccines.

samplePhrase.en: You're due for your flu vaccine and pneumonia vaccine this year.
samplePhrase.es: Es hora de su vacuna contra la gripe y la vacuna neumocócica este año.

family-medicine.title: Mental Health Screening
family-medicine.scenario: Screening for depression and anxiety during a preventive care visit.

samplePhrase.en: I want to ask if you've been feeling sad or anxious lately, which is common but treatable.
samplePhrase.es: Quiero preguntarle si se ha sentido triste o ansioso últimamente, lo cual es común pero tratable.

family-medicine.title: Smoking Cessation and Substance Use
family-medicine.scenario: Discussing smoking and substance use history and providing cessation resources.

samplePhrase.en: Quitting smoking will greatly improve your health. Would you like information about cessation programs?
samplePhrase.es: Dejar de fumar mejorará mucho su salud. ¿Le gustaría información sobre programas de cese?

family-medicine.title: Medication Adherence and Follow-up
family-medicine.scenario: Assessing patient compliance with medication and scheduling necessary follow-up visits.

samplePhrase.en: Are you taking your blood pressure medication every day? Let's schedule a follow-up in three months.
samplePhrase.es: ¿Está tomando su medicamento para la presión arterial todos los días? Programemos un seguimiento en tres meses.

family-medicine.title: Chronic Pain Management
family-medicine.scenario: Evaluating chronic pain and discussing treatment options including non-opioid alternatives.

samplePhrase.en: Let's try physical therapy and over-the-counter pain relief first before considering stronger medication.
samplePhrase.es: Probemos primero con terapia física y alivio del dolor sin receta antes de considerar medicamentos más fuertes.

family-medicine.title: Preventive Health Summary and Next Steps
family-medicine.scenario: Summarizing preventive care recommendations and outlining the patient's healthcare plan moving forward.

samplePhrase.en: Let's summarize: continue your medications, exercise three times weekly, eat healthy foods, and return for your next annual exam.
samplePhrase.es: Resumamos: continúe con sus medicamentos, haga ejercicio tres veces por semana, coma alimentos saludables, y regrese para su próximo examen anual.

obgyn.title: Initial Prenatal Visit
obgyn.scenario: A healthcare worker greets a pregnant patient at her first prenatal appointment and collects basic information.

samplePhrase.en: We need to check your blood pressure and take a urine sample today.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos revisar su presión arterial y tomar una muestra de orina hoy.

obgyn.title: Discussing Pregnancy Symptoms
obgyn.scenario: A clinician asks a pregnant patient about common symptoms she may be experiencing.

samplePhrase.en: Are you experiencing any nausea or vomiting in the morning?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Está experimentando náuseas o vómito por la mañana?

obgyn.title: Prenatal Testing Options
obgyn.scenario: A healthcare worker explains screening and diagnostic tests available during pregnancy.

vocab.es: prueba de tolerancia a la glucosa

samplePhrase.en: We recommend an ultrasound to check the baby's development.
samplePhrase.es: Recomendamos un ultrasonido para revisar el desarrollo del bebé.

obgyn.title: Lifestyle and Nutrition in Pregnancy
obgyn.scenario: A clinician discusses diet, exercise, and healthy habits with a pregnant patient.

samplePhrase.en: You should take prenatal vitamins with folic acid every day.
samplePhrase.es: Debe tomar vitaminas prenatales con ácido fólico todos los días.

obgyn.title: Complications and Warning Signs
obgyn.scenario: A healthcare worker educates a patient about serious pregnancy complications and when to seek emergency care.

samplePhrase.en: If you have severe headache or chest pain, go to the emergency room immediately.
samplePhrase.es: Si tiene dolor de cabeza severo o dolor en el pecho, vaya a la sala de emergencia inmediatamente.

obgyn.title: Pelvic Exam During Pregnancy
obgyn.scenario: A clinician prepares a pregnant patient for a routine pelvic examination.

samplePhrase.en: I need to perform a pelvic exam to check your cervix.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito realizar un examen pélvico para revisar su cuello uterino.

obgyn.title: Ultrasound Explanation and Findings
obgyn.scenario: A sonographer or clinician explains what they are looking at during a prenatal ultrasound.

samplePhrase.en: The baby's heartbeat looks strong and the measurements are normal for your due date.
samplePhrase.es: El latido cardíaco del bebé se ve fuerte y las medidas son normales para su fecha de parto.

obgyn.title: Preparing for Labor
obgyn.scenario: A healthcare worker discusses labor preparation, pain management options, and what to expect during delivery.

samplePhrase.en: Would you like to discuss pain management options for labor?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Le gustaría discutir opciones de manejo del dolor para el parto?

obgyn.title: Admission to Labor and Delivery
obgyn.scenario: A triage nurse admits a patient in active labor and gathers vital information.

samplePhrase.en: How often are you having contractions and how long do they last?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Con qué frecuencia tiene contracciones y cuánto tiempo duran?

obgyn.title: Second Stage: Pushing and Delivery
obgyn.scenario: A clinician guides a patient during the pushing stage and prepares for the baby's delivery.

samplePhrase.en: Push with the next contraction. You are doing great!
samplePhrase.es: ¡Puje con la próxima contracción. ¡Lo está haciendo muy bien!

obgyn.title: Third Stage: Placenta Delivery
obgyn.scenario: A clinician explains what happens after the baby is born and manages delivery of the placenta.

samplePhrase.en: We are giving you medication to help the placenta come out and prevent heavy bleeding.
samplePhrase.es: Le estamos dando medicamento para ayudar a que salga la placenta y prevenir sangrado abundante.

obgyn.title: Immediate Postpartum Recovery
obgyn.scenario: A healthcare worker monitors a new mother in the immediate postpartum period and assesses her condition.

samplePhrase.en: Let's help you start breastfeeding your baby right away.
samplePhrase.es: Vamos a ayudarle a comenzar a amamantar a su bebé de inmediato.

obgyn.title: Postpartum Complications and Warning Signs
obgyn.scenario: A clinician educates a postpartum patient about serious complications and signs to watch for at home.

samplePhrase.en: If you have heavy bleeding, fever, or severe pain, call us right away.
samplePhrase.es: Si tiene sangrado abundante, fiebre o dolor severo, llámenos de inmediato.

obgyn.title: Gynecologic Exam: Annual Physical
obgyn.scenario: A clinician performs a routine annual gynecologic examination on a non-pregnant patient.

samplePhrase.en: I am going to perform a pap smear to screen for cervical cancer.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a realizar una prueba de Papanicolau para detectar cáncer cervical.

obgyn.title: Family Planning and Contraception
obgyn.scenario: A healthcare worker discusses contraceptive options and family planning goals with a patient.

samplePhrase.en: What type of birth control are you interested in using?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Qué tipo de control de natalidad le interesa usar?

obgyn.title: Gestational Diabetes Screening
obgyn.scenario: Discussing glucose tolerance test results with a pregnant patient at 24-28 weeks.

vocab.es: prueba de tolerancia a la glucosa

samplePhrase.en: Your glucose test shows elevated levels; we need to monitor your blood sugar carefully.
samplePhrase.es: Su prueba de glucosa muestra niveles elevados; necesitamos monitorear su azúcar en sangre cuidadosamente.

obgyn.title: Preeclampsia Risk Assessment
obgyn.scenario: Evaluating blood pressure elevation and proteinuria in the third trimester.

samplePhrase.en: Your blood pressure is high and you have protein in your urine; this requires close monitoring.
samplePhrase.es: Su presión arterial es alta y tiene proteína en la orina; esto requiere monitoreo cercano.

obgyn.title: Fetal Movement and NST
obgyn.scenario: Teaching a pregnant patient about kick counts and explaining a non-stress test.

samplePhrase.en: Count the baby's movements daily; if you feel fewer than ten kicks in two hours, come to the hospital.
samplePhrase.es: Cuente los movimientos del bebé diariamente; si siente menos de diez patadas en dos horas, venga al hospital.

obgyn.title: Rh Incompatibility and RhoGAM
obgyn.scenario: Explaining Rh negative status and need for RhoGAM injection during pregnancy.

vocab.es: tipo de sangre de la pareja

samplePhrase.en: Because you are Rh negative, you need a RhoGAM injection to prevent your body from making antibodies against your baby.
samplePhrase.es: Debido a que es Rh negativa, necesita una inyección de RhoGAM para evitar que su cuerpo produzca anticuerpos contra su bebé.

obgyn.title: Cervical Insufficiency and Cerclage
obgyn.scenario: Discussing cervical cerclage procedure for a patient with recurrent pregnancy loss.

samplePhrase.en: Your cervix is becoming shorter; we may need to place a cerclage stitch to support the pregnancy.
samplePhrase.es: Su cuello uterino se está acortando; es posible que necesitemos colocar una sutura de cerclaje para apoyar el embarazo.

obgyn.title: Placental Abruption and Bleeding
obgyn.scenario: Managing a patient presenting with vaginal bleeding and abdominal pain in third trimester.

samplePhrase.en: The bleeding and pain suggest the placenta may be separating; we need to go to the operating room immediately.
samplePhrase.es: El sangrado y el dolor sugieren que la placenta se puede estar desprendiendo; necesitamos ir al quirófano inmediatamente.

obgyn.title: Induction of Labor Overview
obgyn.scenario: Explaining labor induction indications, methods, and risks to a patient.

samplePhrase.en: Your pregnancy is two weeks overdue; we will induce labor today with medication to strengthen contractions.
samplePhrase.es: Su embarazo tiene dos semanas de retraso; induciremos el parto hoy con medicamento para fortalecer las contracciones.

obgyn.title: Labor Progression and Augmentation
obgyn.scenario: Discussing slow labor progression and use of Pitocin augmentation.

samplePhrase.en: Your labor is progressing slowly; we will start Pitocin to make the contractions stronger.
samplePhrase.es: Su parto está progresando lentamente; comenzaremos a administrar oxitocina para hacer que las contracciones sean más fuertes.

obgyn.title: Epidural Anesthesia Consent
obgyn.scenario: Explaining epidural placement, benefits, and side effects during active labor.

vocab.es: adormecimiento de la parte inferior del cuerpo

samplePhrase.en: An epidural can help control your pain; a catheter will be placed in your back to deliver medication continuously.
samplePhrase.es: Una epidural puede ayudar a controlar su dolor; se colocará un catéter en su espalda para administrar medicamento continuamente.

obgyn.title: Fetal Heart Rate Monitoring
obgyn.scenario: Interpreting fetal heart rate patterns and explaining Category I, II, and III tracings.

samplePhrase.en: The baby's heart rate shows some concerning patterns; we need to reposition you and increase oxygen.
samplePhrase.es: La frecuencia cardíaca del bebé muestra algunos patrones preocupantes; necesitamos cambiar su posición e aumentar el oxígeno.

obgyn.title: Vacuum and Forceps Delivery
obgyn.scenario: Obtaining consent for operative vaginal delivery in the second stage of labor.

samplePhrase.en: You are very tired and the baby needs help coming out; we will use a vacuum to assist the delivery.
samplePhrase.es: Está muy cansada y el bebé necesita ayuda para salir; usaremos un vacío para asistir el parto.

obgyn.title: Postpartum Hemorrhage Management
obgyn.scenario: Managing active bleeding in the fourth stage of labor.

samplePhrase.en: You are bleeding heavily; we will massage your uterus and give you medication to help it contract.
samplePhrase.es: Está sangrando mucho; masajearemos su útero y le daremos medicamento para ayudarlo a contraerse.

obgyn.title: Postpartum Recovery and Lochia
obgyn.scenario: Educating new mother about normal postpartum bleeding and recovery signs.

samplePhrase.en: You will have vaginal bleeding for two to six weeks; this is normal after delivery.
samplePhrase.es: Tendrá sangrado vaginal durante dos a seis semanas; esto es normal después del parto.

obgyn.title: Postpartum Mood Disorders Screening
obgyn.scenario: Assessing for postpartum depression and anxiety in early postpartum period.

samplePhrase.en: I want to ask about your mood; some mothers feel sad or anxious after delivery, and we can help.
samplePhrase.es: Quiero preguntar sobre su estado de ánimo; algunas madres se sienten tristes o ansiosas después del parto, y podemos ayudar.

obgyn.title: Gynecologic Exam and Pap Smear
obgyn.scenario: Performing routine gynecologic exam and cervical cytology screening with patient education.

samplePhrase.en: I will now perform a pelvic exam; please relax and let me know if anything is uncomfortable.
samplePhrase.es: Ahora realizaré un examen pélvico; por favor relájese y avíseme si algo es incómodo.

surgery.title: Initial Pre-Op Assessment
surgery.scenario: Nurse greets patient in pre-op area and begins vital signs assessment.

samplePhrase.en: Good morning. I'm going to check your vital signs and ask you some questions about your health.
samplePhrase.es: Buenos días. Voy a verificar sus signos vitales y hacerle algunas preguntas sobre su salud.

surgery.title: Surgical Consent Explanation
surgery.scenario: Surgeon reviews the surgical procedure with patient before obtaining consent.

samplePhrase.en: The surgery will involve making an incision to remove the diseased tissue. Do you have any questions?
samplePhrase.es: La cirugía implicará hacer una incisión para extirpar el tejido enfermo. ¿Tiene alguna pregunta?

surgery.title: NPO Status Verification
surgery.scenario: Nurse confirms patient has not eaten or drunk anything before surgery.

samplePhrase.en: It's very important that you haven't eaten or drunk anything since midnight. Did you follow these instructions?
samplePhrase.es: Es muy importante que no haya comido ni bebido nada desde la medianoche. ¿Siguió estas instrucciones?

surgery.title: Medication Review Before Anesthesia
surgery.scenario: Anesthesiologist reviews current medications with patient.

samplePhrase.en: Which of these blood pressure medications did you take this morning?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cuál de estos medicamentos para la presión arterial tomó esta mañana?

surgery.title: Anesthesia Type Discussion
surgery.scenario: Anesthesiologist explains different anesthesia options to patient.

samplePhrase.en: You will receive general anesthesia, which means you will be completely asleep during the surgery.
samplePhrase.es: Recibirá anestesia general, lo que significa que estará completamente dormido durante la cirugía.

surgery.title: Anesthesia Side Effects and Risks
surgery.scenario: Anesthesiologist explains possible side effects and risks of anesthesia.

samplePhrase.en: Most patients experience some nausea after general anesthesia, but we have medications to help prevent this.
samplePhrase.es: La mayoría de los pacientes sienten algo de náuseas después de la anestesia general, pero tenemos medicamentos para ayudar a prevenirlo.

surgery.title: Pre-Op Positioning and Safety
surgery.scenario: OR nurse explains patient positioning and safety measures before surgery.

samplePhrase.en: We will position you carefully and use padding to protect your nerves during surgery.
samplePhrase.es: Lo posicionaremos cuidadosamente y usaremos acolchado para proteger sus nervios durante la cirugía.

surgery.title: Intraoperative Team Communication
surgery.scenario: Surgical team communicates with patient upon entering OR.

samplePhrase.en: Hello, I'm Dr. Rodriguez, your surgeon. My team and I will take good care of you.
samplePhrase.es: Hola, soy la Dra. Rodríguez, su cirujana. Mi equipo y yo cuidaremos bien de usted.

surgery.title: Surgical Site Marking
surgery.scenario: Surgeon marks the surgical site with patient before procedure.

samplePhrase.en: I'm marking your right knee with a pen to make sure we operate on the correct site.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a marcar su rodilla derecha con un marcador para asegurarme de que operamos en el sitio correcto.

surgery.title: Intraoperative Bleeding Management
surgery.scenario: Surgical team manages bleeding during procedure and communicates findings.

samplePhrase.en: We are managing the bleeding with cautery and the patient is stable.
samplePhrase.es: Estamos controlando el sangrado con cauterización y el paciente es estable.

surgery.title: Immediate Post-Op Recovery Room
surgery.scenario: Recovery nurse briefs patient upon arrival in post-anesthesia care unit.

samplePhrase.en: Welcome to the recovery room. Your surgery went well. Tell me if you have any pain.
samplePhrase.es: Bienvenido a la sala de recuperación. Su cirugía salió bien. Dígame si tiene algún dolor.

surgery.title: Post-Op Pain Management
surgery.scenario: Nurse assesses post-operative pain and administers appropriate pain relief.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of zero to ten, how much pain do you have right now?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala de cero a diez, ¿cuánto dolor tiene en este momento?

surgery.title: Post-Op Nausea and Vomiting
surgery.scenario: Nurse addresses nausea and vomiting in recovery and administers anti-nausea medication.

samplePhrase.en: Many patients feel queasy after anesthesia. I'm giving you medication to help with the nausea.
samplePhrase.es: Muchos pacientes se sienten nauseabundos después de la anestesia. Le estoy dando medicamento para ayudar con las náuseas.

surgery.title: Surgical Complication: Infection
surgery.scenario: Nurse observes signs of infection and alerts surgeon.

samplePhrase.en: The surgical site is showing signs of infection. We need to start you on antibiotics right away.
samplePhrase.es: El sitio quirúrgico muestra signos de infección. Necesitamos comenzar con antibióticos de inmediato.

surgery.title: Post-Op Complication: Deep Vein Thrombosis
surgery.scenario: Nurse detects symptoms of blood clot and alerts clinical team.

samplePhrase.en: Your leg is very swollen and warm. We need to get an ultrasound to check for a blood clot.
samplePhrase.es: Su pierna está muy hinchada y caliente. Necesitamos hacer un ultrasonido para verificar si hay un coágulo de sangre.

surgery.title: Pre-op NPO Status
surgery.scenario: Nurse instructs patient on fasting requirements before surgery.

samplePhrase.en: You cannot eat or drink anything after midnight before your surgery.
samplePhrase.es: No puede comer ni beber nada después de la medianoche antes de su cirugía.

surgery.title: Informed Surgical Consent
surgery.scenario: Surgeon explains procedure risks and benefits before obtaining written consent.

samplePhrase.en: Do you have any questions about the risks and benefits of this surgery before you sign?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Tiene alguna pregunta sobre los riesgos y beneficios de esta cirugía antes de firmar?

surgery.title: Anesthesia Pre-operative Assessment
surgery.scenario: Anesthesiologist interviews patient about medical history and allergies.

samplePhrase.en: Have you ever had a bad reaction to anesthesia or surgery?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Ha tenido alguna vez una reacción negativa a la anestesia o a la cirugía?

surgery.title: Anesthesia Type Explanation
surgery.scenario: Anesthesiologist explains differences between general, regional, and local anesthesia.

samplePhrase.en: For your surgery, you will receive general anesthesia, which means you will be asleep the entire time.
samplePhrase.es: Para su cirugía, recibirá anestesia general, lo que significa que estará dormido todo el tiempo.

surgery.title: Pre-op Medication Administration
surgery.scenario: Nurse administers pre-operative sedative and explains effects.

samplePhrase.en: This medication will help you relax and you may feel drowsy.
samplePhrase.es: Este medicamento lo ayudará a relajarse y puede sentir somnolencia.

surgery.title: Intraoperative Positioning
surgery.scenario: OR nurse positions patient on operating table for surgery.

samplePhrase.en: We are going to roll you onto your side now. Just relax and we will support your body.
samplePhrase.es: Ahora lo vamos a girar hacia un lado. Solo relájese y apoyaremos su cuerpo.

surgery.title: Intraoperative Communication with Unconscious Patient
surgery.scenario: Anesthesiologist speaks to patient during surgery despite unconsciousness.

samplePhrase.en: Everything is going very well. Your vital signs are stable and we are almost finished.
samplePhrase.es: Todo está yendo muy bien. Sus signos vitales son estables y casi terminamos.

surgery.title: Post-op Emergence and Extubation
surgery.scenario: Anesthesiologist wakes patient and removes breathing tube in PACU.

samplePhrase.en: Your surgery is complete. We are removing the breathing tube now. Just relax and cough gently.
samplePhrase.es: Su cirugía está completa. Estamos removiendo el tubo de respiración ahora. Solo relájese y tosa suavemente.

surgery.title: Post-op Pain Assessment
surgery.scenario: PACU nurse assesses patient's pain level on numeric scale.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of 0 to 10, with 10 being the worst pain, how much pain do you have right now?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala de 0 a 10, siendo 10 el peor dolor, ¿cuánto dolor tiene en este momento?

surgery.title: Post-op Nausea Management
surgery.scenario: Nurse manages post-operative nausea and vomiting.

samplePhrase.en: Nausea after surgery is very common. I will give you medicine to help you feel better.
samplePhrase.es: Las náuseas después de la cirugía son muy comunes. Le daré medicina para ayudarle a sentirse mejor.

surgery.title: Post-op Mobilization Instructions
surgery.scenario: Physical therapist instructs patient on early movement after surgery.

samplePhrase.en: It is important to move and walk soon after surgery to prevent blood clots. I will help you.
samplePhrase.es: Es importante moverse y caminar pronto después de la cirugía para prevenir coágulos de sangre. Lo ayudaré.

surgery.title: Surgical Site Wound Care
surgery.scenario: Nurse teaches patient about incision care and signs of infection.

samplePhrase.en: Keep your incision clean and dry. Watch for signs of infection like redness, swelling, or drainage.
samplePhrase.es: Mantenga su incisión limpia y seca. Vigile los signos de infección como enrojecimiento, hinchazón o drenaje.

surgery.title: Post-op Complication: Fever
surgery.scenario: Nurse addresses elevated temperature and possible infection post-operatively.

samplePhrase.en: Your temperature is elevated. We need to notify your doctor and possibly start antibiotics.
samplePhrase.es: Su temperatura está elevada. Necesitamos notificar a su doctor e posiblemente comenzar antibióticos.

surgery.title: Post-op Complication: Bleeding
surgery.scenario: Nurse responds to excessive bleeding or hematoma post-operatively.

samplePhrase.en: We notice there is more bleeding than expected. We are applying pressure and will monitor closely.
samplePhrase.es: Notamos que hay más sangrado del esperado. Estamos aplicando presión y lo monitorizaremos de cerca.

surgery.title: Post-op Discharge Instructions
surgery.scenario: Nurse provides comprehensive discharge instructions and medication list.

samplePhrase.en: Do not lift anything heavier than 10 pounds for six weeks. Call your doctor if you have fever, excessive bleeding, or chest pain.
samplePhrase.es: No levante nada más pesado que 10 libras durante seis semanas. Llame a su doctor si tiene fiebre, sangrado excesivo o dolor de pecho.

cardiology.title: Initial Chest Pain Assessment
cardiology.scenario: A patient presents to the emergency department complaining of chest discomfort and you need to obtain a detailed history of the pain.

samplePhrase.en: Can you describe the chest pain you are feeling right now?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Puede describir el dolor de pecho que está sintiendo en este momento?

cardiology.title: Cardiac Risk Factor History
cardiology.scenario: You are interviewing a patient to identify cardiac risk factors including diabetes, hypertension, and smoking history.

samplePhrase.en: Do you have a family history of heart disease?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Tiene antecedentes familiares de enfermedad del corazón?

cardiology.title: EKG Preparation and Lead Placement
cardiology.scenario: You are preparing a patient for an electrocardiogram and need to explain the procedure and position the leads correctly.

samplePhrase.en: I'm going to place these sticky patches on your chest to record your heart rhythm.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a colocar estos parches adhesivos en su pecho para registrar el ritmo de su corazón.

cardiology.title: EKG Rhythm Interpretation Basics
cardiology.scenario: You are reviewing an EKG with a patient and explaining basic findings about their heart rhythm.

samplePhrase.en: Your EKG shows an irregular heart rhythm called atrial fibrillation.
samplePhrase.es: Su EKG muestra un ritmo cardíaco irregular llamado fibrilación auricular.

cardiology.title: Acute Myocardial Infarction Discussion
cardiology.scenario: You are informing a patient that they have had a heart attack and need to explain the condition and next steps.

samplePhrase.en: You have had a heart attack and we need to open the blocked artery immediately.
samplePhrase.es: Ha sufrido un infarto y necesitamos abrir la arteria bloqueada de inmediato.

cardiology.title: Aspirin and Antiplatelet Medications
cardiology.scenario: You are prescribing aspirin and explaining its purpose in preventing blood clots after a cardiac event.

samplePhrase.en: Take one aspirin tablet by mouth every day to help prevent future blood clots.
samplePhrase.es: Tome una tableta de aspirina por vía oral todos los días para ayudar a prevenir futuros coágulos de sangre.

cardiology.title: Beta-Blocker Therapy
cardiology.scenario: You are prescribing a beta-blocker to a patient and explaining how it slows the heart rate and reduces workload.

vocab.es: no deje de tomar de repente

samplePhrase.en: This medication will help your heart work less hard and reduce your heart rate.
samplePhrase.es: Este medicamento ayudará a que su corazón trabaje menos y reducirá su frecuencia cardíaca.

cardiology.title: ACE Inhibitor and ARB Medications
cardiology.scenario: You are explaining how ACE inhibitors and ARBs protect the heart and kidneys by lowering blood pressure.

vocab.es: antagonista de los receptores de angiotensina

samplePhrase.en: This medication relaxes your blood vessels and protects your heart and kidneys.
samplePhrase.es: Este medicamento relaja sus vasos sanguíneos y protege su corazón y riñones.

cardiology.title: Statin and Lipid Management
cardiology.scenario: You are prescribing a statin to lower cholesterol and explaining the importance of lipid control in heart disease prevention.

samplePhrase.en: This statin will help lower your cholesterol and reduce your risk of another heart attack.
samplePhrase.es: Esta estatina ayudará a bajar su colesterol y reducirá el riesgo de otro infarto.

cardiology.title: Heart Failure Diagnosis and Classification
cardiology.scenario: You are informing a patient of a heart failure diagnosis and explaining the difference between systolic and diastolic dysfunction.

samplePhrase.en: Your heart is not pumping blood as efficiently as it should, which we call heart failure.
samplePhrase.es: Su corazón no está bombeando la sangre tan eficientemente como debería, lo que llamamos insuficiencia cardíaca.

cardiology.title: Diuretic Therapy and Fluid Restriction
cardiology.scenario: You are prescribing diuretics to a heart failure patient and explaining fluid and sodium restrictions.

samplePhrase.en: This water pill will help remove the extra fluid from your body and reduce the swelling.
samplePhrase.es: Esta píldora de agua ayudará a eliminar el líquido adicional de su cuerpo y reducirá la hinchazón.

cardiology.title: Heart Failure Symptoms and Warning Signs
cardiology.scenario: You are educating a heart failure patient on symptoms to monitor and when to seek emergency care.

vocab.es: vaya a la sala de emergencias

samplePhrase.en: If you experience severe shortness of breath or chest pain, call 911 immediately.
samplePhrase.es: Si experimenta falta de aire grave o dolor en el pecho, llame al 911 inmediatamente.

cardiology.title: Coronary Angiography Procedure
cardiology.scenario: You are preparing a patient for cardiac catheterization with coronary angiography to visualize the coronary arteries.

samplePhrase.en: We will pass a small tube through your artery to look at the blood vessels in your heart.
samplePhrase.es: Pasaremos un tubo pequeño a través de su arteria para ver los vasos sanguíneos en su corazón.

cardiology.title: Percutaneous Coronary Intervention (PCI) and Stent Placement
cardiology.scenario: You are explaining the percutaneous coronary intervention procedure and stent placement to open blocked arteries.

samplePhrase.en: We will place a small metal stent in the blocked artery to keep it open and restore blood flow.
samplePhrase.es: Colocaremos un pequeño stent de metal en la arteria bloqueada para mantenerla abierta y restaurar el flujo de sangre.

cardiology.title: Post-Procedure Recovery and Medications
cardiology.scenario: You are providing discharge instructions to a patient after an interventional cardiac procedure, reviewing medications and activity restrictions.

samplePhrase.en: Take these medications exactly as prescribed and keep your follow-up appointment in two weeks.
samplePhrase.es: Tome estos medicamentos exactamente como se recetan y mantenga su cita de seguimiento en dos semanas.

cardiology.title: Acute Chest Pain Assessment
cardiology.scenario: A patient presents to the emergency department with sudden onset chest pain and you need to quickly assess severity and characteristics.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of one to ten, how severe is your chest pain right now?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala del uno al diez, ¿qué tan intenso es su dolor de pecho en este momento?

cardiology.title: EKG Lead Placement and Patient Positioning
cardiology.scenario: You are preparing a Spanish-speaking patient for an electrocardiogram and need to explain electrode placement and positioning.

samplePhrase.en: I'm going to place these electrode pads on your chest. Please lie flat and try to relax.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a colocar estos parches de electrodo en su pecho. Por favor, acuéstese plano e intente relajarse.

cardiology.title: EKG Abnormalities and ST Segment Changes
cardiology.scenario: You are reviewing EKG results with a Spanish-speaking patient that show concerning findings requiring intervention.

samplePhrase.en: Your EKG shows some abnormal changes that indicate reduced blood flow to your heart.
samplePhrase.es: Su electrocardiograma muestra algunos cambios anormales que indican flujo de sangre reducido al corazón.

cardiology.title: Aspirin and Antiplatelet Therapy Initiation
cardiology.scenario: You are administering aspirin and explaining its purpose to a patient with acute coronary syndrome.

samplePhrase.en: I need you to chew this aspirin tablet right away. It will help prevent blood clots.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito que mastique esta tableta de aspirina ahora mismo. Ayudará a prevenir coágulos de sangre.

cardiology.title: Beta-Blockers and Heart Rate Management
cardiology.scenario: You are administering a beta-blocker and explaining how it slows heart rate and reduces cardiac workload.

vocab.es: reducir el estrés en el corazón

samplePhrase.en: This medication will help slow your heart rate and lower your blood pressure to reduce stress on your heart.
samplePhrase.es: Este medicamento ayudará a ralentizar su frecuencia cardíaca y bajar su presión arterial para reducir el estrés en su corazón.

cardiology.title: ACE Inhibitors and Angiotensin Receptor Blockers
cardiology.scenario: You are explaining how ACE inhibitors help relax blood vessels and reduce heart workload in a patient with heart failure or hypertension.

samplePhrase.en: This medication relaxes your blood vessels to help your heart pump more efficiently and lower your blood pressure.
samplePhrase.es: Este medicamento relaja sus vasos sanguíneos para ayudar a su corazón a bombear más eficientemente y bajar su presión arterial.

cardiology.title: Statin Therapy and Cholesterol Management
cardiology.scenario: You are educating a patient about cholesterol-lowering medications and the importance of controlling lipid levels.

samplePhrase.en: This statin medication helps lower your cholesterol and reduce plaque buildup in your arteries.
samplePhrase.es: Este medicamento de estatina ayuda a bajar su colesterol y reduce la acumulación de placa en sus arterias.

cardiology.title: Diuretics and Fluid Management in Heart Failure
cardiology.scenario: You are explaining diuretics to a patient with heart failure who is experiencing fluid retention and shortness of breath.

samplePhrase.en: This water pill will help remove extra fluid from your body and reduce the swelling in your legs.
samplePhrase.es: Esta píldora de agua ayudará a eliminar el exceso de líquido de su cuerpo y reducir la hinchazón en sus piernas.

cardiology.title: Nitrates for Angina and Acute Chest Pain
cardiology.scenario: You are instructing a patient with angina on the use of sublingual nitroglycerin during episodes of chest pain.

vocab.es: dolor de cabeza como efecto secundario

samplePhrase.en: If you experience chest pain, place one nitroglycerin tablet under your tongue and wait for relief. If pain continues after five minutes, call 911.
samplePhrase.es: Si experimenta dolor de pecho, coloque una tableta de nitroglicerina bajo la lengua y espere el alivio. Si el dolor continúa después de cinco minutos, llame al 911.

cardiology.title: Heart Failure Symptoms and Daily Monitoring
cardiology.scenario: You are educating a heart failure patient on recognizing worsening symptoms and the importance of daily weight monitoring.

samplePhrase.en: Weigh yourself every morning at the same time. If you gain more than three pounds in one day, contact your doctor right away.
samplePhrase.es: Pésese cada mañana a la misma hora. Si gana más de tres libras en un día, póngase en contacto con su médico de inmediato.

cardiology.title: Cardiac Catheterization Preparation
cardiology.scenario: You are preparing a Spanish-speaking patient for a cardiac catheterization procedure and explaining what to expect.

samplePhrase.en: A thin tube called a catheter will be inserted through your groin to examine your heart arteries. You will receive mild sedation and will not feel pain.
samplePhrase.es: Se insertará un tubo delgado llamado catéter a través de su ingle para examinar las arterias del corazón. Recibirá sedación leve y no sentirá dolor.

cardiology.title: Coronary Angioplasty and Stent Placement
cardiology.scenario: You are explaining the angioplasty procedure and stent placement to a patient with a blocked coronary artery.

samplePhrase.en: We will use a balloon to open the blocked artery and place a small metal tube called a stent to keep it open.
samplePhrase.es: Usaremos un globo para abrir la arteria bloqueada y colocar un tubo pequeño de metal llamado stent para mantenerla abierta.

cardiology.title: Post-Intervention Care and Anticoagulation
cardiology.scenario: You are instructing a patient after stent placement on the importance of dual antiplatelet therapy and follow-up care.

samplePhrase.en: You must take both aspirin and clopidogrel every day as prescribed. Do not stop these medications without talking to your doctor.
samplePhrase.es: Debe tomar aspirina y clopidogrel todos los días según se prescribe. No suspenda estos medicamentos sin hablar con su médico.

cardiology.title: Coronary Artery Bypass Surgery Preparation
cardiology.scenario: You are explaining coronary artery bypass graft surgery to a patient who requires surgical revascularization.

samplePhrase.en: You will need open heart surgery where we will use a vein from your leg to create a new pathway for blood to bypass the blocked artery.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitará cirugía de corazón abierto donde usaremos una vena de su pierna para crear una nueva ruta para que la sangre evite la arteria bloqueada.

cardiology.title: Post-Operative Recovery and Cardiac Rehabilitation
cardiology.scenario: You are instructing a post-cardiac surgery patient on wound care, activity progression, and enrollment in cardiac rehabilitation.

samplePhrase.en: Once you're healed, we recommend cardiac rehabilitation three times per week where trained staff will help you exercise safely and educate you about heart health.
samplePhrase.es: Una vez que se haya curado, recomendamos rehabilitación cardíaca tres veces por semana donde el personal capacitado lo ayudará a hacer ejercicio de forma segura y lo educará sobre la salud del corazón.

physical-therapy.title: Initial Pain Assessment
