physical-therapy.scenario: A physical therapist is conducting an initial evaluation and needs to assess the patient's pain level and location.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate your pain right now?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala del 1 al 10, ¿cómo calificaría su dolor en este momento?

physical-therapy.title: Range of Motion Instructions
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is instructing a patient to perform basic range of motion movements for the shoulder.

samplePhrase.en: Slowly raise your arm to the side, and stop if it hurts.
samplePhrase.es: Levante lentamente el brazo hacia el lado, y pare si duele.

physical-therapy.title: Gait Assessment Setup
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is preparing to assess the patient's walking pattern and balance.

samplePhrase.en: Please walk naturally while I observe your gait and balance.
samplePhrase.es: Por favor, camine naturalmente mientras observo su marcha y equilibrio.

physical-therapy.title: Strength Testing Positions
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is positioning the patient to test muscle strength in the lower extremities.

samplePhrase.en: Lie on your back and push your leg down against my hand.
samplePhrase.es: Acuéstese boca arriba y empuje la pierna hacia abajo contra mi mano.

physical-therapy.title: Home Exercise Program Introduction
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is explaining the importance of a home exercise program to support recovery.

samplePhrase.en: It is very important to do these exercises at home every day to help you recover faster.
samplePhrase.es: Es muy importante hacer estos ejercicios en casa todos los días para recuperarse más rápido.

physical-therapy.title: Functional Mobility Assessment
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is evaluating the patient's ability to perform activities of daily living.

samplePhrase.en: Can you show me how you get up from the bed on your own?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Puede mostrarme cómo se levanta de la cama por su cuenta?

physical-therapy.title: Flexibility and Stretching Exercises
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is teaching stretching exercises to improve flexibility in tight muscles.

samplePhrase.en: Bend forward gently and hold this stretch for 30 seconds without pain.
samplePhrase.es: Inclinese hacia adelante suavemente y mantenga este estiramiento durante 30 segundos sin dolor.

physical-therapy.title: Rehabilitation Goals Setting
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is discussing short-term and long-term rehabilitation goals with the patient.

samplePhrase.en: Our goal is to help you walk without pain and return to your normal activities.
samplePhrase.es: Nuestro objetivo es ayudarle a caminar sin dolor y volver a sus actividades normales.

physical-therapy.title: Balance and Stability Training
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is instructing the patient on exercises to improve balance and prevent falls.

samplePhrase.en: Stand near the wall for support and practice shifting your weight from side to side.
samplePhrase.es: Párese cerca de la pared para obtener apoyo y practique cambiar su peso de un lado al otro.

physical-therapy.title: Pain Management Strategies
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is discussing ways to manage pain during and after exercises.

samplePhrase.en: Apply ice for 15 minutes after exercise to reduce swelling and pain.
samplePhrase.es: Aplique hielo durante 15 minutos después del ejercicio para reducir la hinchazón y el dolor.

physical-therapy.title: Posture and Body Mechanics
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is teaching proper posture and body mechanics to prevent re-injury.

samplePhrase.en: Keep your back straight and bend at your knees when lifting something from the floor.
samplePhrase.es: Mantenga la espalda recta e inclínese en las rodillas al levantar algo del piso.

physical-therapy.title: Resistance Training Progression
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is advancing the patient's exercise program with resistance bands or weights.

samplePhrase.en: Now we will add a resistance band to make the exercise more challenging.
samplePhrase.es: Ahora agregaremos una banda de resistencia para hacer el ejercicio más desafiante.

physical-therapy.title: Progress Monitoring and Documentation
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is explaining how progress is measured and documented throughout therapy.

samplePhrase.en: We will measure your range of motion and strength regularly to track your progress.
samplePhrase.es: Mediremos regularmente su amplitud de movimiento y fuerza para rastrear su progreso.

physical-therapy.title: Activity Modification and Pacing
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is teaching the patient how to modify activities and pace themselves during recovery.

samplePhrase.en: Gradually increase your activities, but make sure to take rest days to recover.
samplePhrase.es: Aumente gradualmente sus actividades, pero asegúrese de tomar días de descanso para recuperarse.

physical-therapy.title: Discharge Planning and Home Safety
physical-therapy.scenario: The therapist is preparing the patient for discharge with home safety recommendations and independence strategies.

samplePhrase.en: Install grab bars in your bathroom and remove tripping hazards from your home.
samplePhrase.es: Instale barras de agarre en su baño y retire los peligros de tropiezo de su hogar.

physical-therapy.title: Range of Motion Assessment
physical-therapy.scenario: A physical therapist measures a patient's joint mobility to establish baseline function.

samplePhrase.en: I'm going to gently move your arm to check your range of motion.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a mover su brazo suavemente para verificar su rango de movimiento.

physical-therapy.title: Pain Location and Intensity
physical-therapy.scenario: A clinician uses a pain scale and anatomical landmarks to document patient discomfort.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate your pain right now?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala del 1 al 10, ¿cómo calificaría su dolor en este momento?

physical-therapy.title: Strengthening Exercises
physical-therapy.scenario: A therapist instructs a patient on resistance-based movements to build muscular strength.

samplePhrase.en: Perform 15 repetitions of this exercise, rest for 30 seconds, then do 2 more sets.
samplePhrase.es: Haga 15 repeticiones de este ejercicio, descanse 30 segundos, luego haga 2 series más.

physical-therapy.title: Stretching and Flexibility
physical-therapy.scenario: A therapist teaches a patient techniques to improve flexibility and reduce muscle tension.

samplePhrase.en: Slowly stretch your leg and hold for 20 to 30 seconds. You should feel a gentle pull, not pain.
samplePhrase.es: Estire lentamente su pierna y manténgala durante 20 a 30 segundos. Debe sentir un tirón suave, no dolor.

physical-therapy.title: Balance and Proprioception Training
physical-therapy.scenario: A clinician designs exercises to improve stability and body awareness in space.

samplePhrase.en: Stand on one leg for 30 seconds. Hold onto the rail if you need to for safety.
samplePhrase.es: Párese sobre una pierna durante 30 segundos. Agárrese de la barra si la necesita para la seguridad.

physical-therapy.title: Gait Training and Ambulation
physical-therapy.scenario: A therapist assesses and improves a patient's walking pattern and functional mobility.

samplePhrase.en: Walk slowly across the room, and I'll watch your walking pattern to identify any problems.
samplePhrase.es: Camine lentamente por la habitación, y observaré su patrón de marcha para identificar problemas.

physical-therapy.title: Posture Correction
physical-therapy.scenario: A clinician evaluates and corrects spinal alignment and postural habits.

samplePhrase.en: Sit up straight and keep your shoulders back to improve your posture throughout the day.
samplePhrase.es: Siéntese recto y mantenga los hombros hacia atrás para mejorar su postura durante todo el día.

physical-therapy.title: Pain Management Strategies
physical-therapy.scenario: A therapist educates a patient on techniques to manage and reduce chronic pain.

samplePhrase.en: Apply ice to your knee for 15 minutes after exercise to reduce swelling and pain.
samplePhrase.es: Aplique hielo en la rodilla durante 15 minutos después del ejercicio para reducir la hinchazón y el dolor.

physical-therapy.title: Functional Mobility Assessment
physical-therapy.scenario: A clinician evaluates a patient's ability to perform activities of daily living.

vocab.es: transición de sentado a de pie

samplePhrase.en: I want to watch you stand up from this chair without using your arms to assess your strength.
samplePhrase.es: Quiero verlo levantarse de esta silla sin usar sus brazos para evaluar su fuerza.

physical-therapy.title: Home Exercise Program Design
physical-therapy.scenario: A therapist creates a customized exercise plan for a patient to perform independently at home.

samplePhrase.en: Do these exercises at home three times a week for the next two weeks, then we'll progress to more challenging ones.
samplePhrase.es: Haga estos ejercicios en casa tres veces a la semana durante las próximas dos semanas, luego pasaremos a unos más desafiantes.

physical-therapy.title: Rehabilitation Goals and Milestones
physical-therapy.scenario: A clinician collaborates with a patient to establish measurable, achievable therapy objectives.

samplePhrase.en: Our goal is for you to walk without pain and climb one flight of stairs independently within four weeks.
samplePhrase.es: Nuestro objetivo es que pueda caminar sin dolor y subir un tramo de escaleras de forma independiente en cuatro semanas.

physical-therapy.title: Lower Extremity Mobility Exercises
physical-therapy.scenario: A therapist focuses on movements specific to the hips, knees, and ankles.

samplePhrase.en: Lie on your back and lift your knee up toward your chest to stretch the hip and low back.
samplePhrase.es: Acuéstese sobre la espalda y levante la rodilla hacia el pecho para estirar la cadera y la zona baja de la espalda.

physical-therapy.title: Upper Extremity Mobility Exercises
physical-therapy.scenario: A therapist prescribes movements targeting the shoulders, elbows, wrists, and hands.

samplePhrase.en: Raise your arm out to the side up to shoulder height and lower it slowly.
samplePhrase.es: Levante el brazo hacia un lado hasta la altura del hombro y bájelo lentamente.

physical-therapy.title: Core Strengthening and Stability
physical-therapy.scenario: A clinician teaches exercises that build abdominal, back, and pelvic floor strength.

samplePhrase.en: Hold your abdominal muscles tight and engage your core before doing any movement.
samplePhrase.es: Mantenga los músculos abdominales apretados y active su centro antes de hacer cualquier movimiento.

physical-therapy.title: Return-to-Activity Planning
physical-therapy.scenario: A therapist guides a patient on safe progression to sports, work, or recreational activities.

samplePhrase.en: You've made excellent progress, and I believe you're ready to gradually return to light duties at work next week.
samplePhrase.es: Ha hecho un progreso excelente, y creo que está listo para regresar gradualmente a tareas ligeras en el trabajo la próxima semana.

pain-management.title: Initial Pain Assessment
pain-management.scenario: A patient presents to the clinic with acute back pain and you need to assess their pain intensity and location.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of 0 to 10, how severe is your pain right now?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala de 0 a 10, ¿qué tan grave es su dolor ahora?

pain-management.title: Pain Duration and Frequency
pain-management.scenario: You are documenting how long a patient has experienced their pain and whether it is constant or intermittent.

samplePhrase.en: Has this pain been constant or does it come and go?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Ha sido este dolor constante o va y viene?

pain-management.title: Functional Impact Assessment
pain-management.scenario: You are evaluating how pain affects a patient's daily activities, mobility, and quality of life.

samplePhrase.en: How does this pain affect your ability to work and perform daily activities?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cómo afecta este dolor su capacidad para trabajar y realizar actividades diarias?

pain-management.title: Opioid Medication Introduction
pain-management.scenario: You are introducing opioid therapy to a patient and explaining what these medications are and their purpose.

samplePhrase.en: I am prescribing an opioid medication to help manage your pain.
samplePhrase.es: Estoy prescribiendo un medicamento opioide para ayudar a controlar su dolor.

pain-management.title: Opioid Dosing Schedule
pain-management.scenario: You are explaining to a patient how often to take their opioid medication and what schedule to follow.

samplePhrase.en: Take one tablet every 6 hours, but do not exceed 4 tablets per day.
samplePhrase.es: Tome una tableta cada 6 horas, pero no exceda 4 tabletas por día.

pain-management.title: Opioid Side Effects
pain-management.scenario: You are educating a patient about potential side effects of opioid medications and what to watch for.

samplePhrase.en: Constipation is a common side effect; drink plenty of water and eat fiber.
samplePhrase.es: El estreñimiento es un efecto secundario común; beba mucha agua y coma fibra.

pain-management.title: Opioid Safety and Precautions
pain-management.scenario: You are instructing a patient on safe opioid use, including not driving and avoiding alcohol.

samplePhrase.en: Do not drive or operate machinery while taking this medication because it may cause drowsiness.
samplePhrase.es: No conduzca ni opere máquinas mientras toma este medicamento porque puede causar somnolencia.

pain-management.title: Nerve Block Procedure Introduction
pain-management.scenario: You are explaining what a nerve block is and why it is being recommended for pain management.

samplePhrase.en: A nerve block is an injection that numbs the nerves causing your pain.
samplePhrase.es: Un bloqueo nervioso es una inyección que adormece los nervios que causan su dolor.

pain-management.title: Nerve Block Preparation
pain-management.scenario: You are preparing a patient for a nerve block procedure and explaining what to expect before the injection.

samplePhrase.en: Please do not eat or drink for 6 hours before the procedure.
samplePhrase.es: Por favor, no coma ni beba durante 6 horas antes del procedimiento.

pain-management.title: Addiction Risk Screening
pain-management.scenario: You are screening a patient for substance use disorder risk before prescribing opioids using validated assessment tools.

samplePhrase.en: Have you or anyone in your family struggled with substance addiction in the past?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Ha luchado usted o alguien en su familia con la adicción a sustancias en el pasado?

pain-management.title: Addiction Warning Signs
pain-management.scenario: You are educating a patient about warning signs of opioid dependence and when to seek help.

samplePhrase.en: If you feel you are becoming dependent on this medication, please contact us immediately.
samplePhrase.es: Si siente que se está volviendo dependiente de este medicamento, contáctenos inmediatamente.

pain-management.title: Multimodal Pain Management Strategy
pain-management.scenario: You are explaining to a patient that combining different pain management approaches is more effective than opioids alone.

samplePhrase.en: We recommend combining medications, physical therapy, and counseling for better pain control.
samplePhrase.es: Recomendamos combinar medicamentos, fisioterapia y asesoramiento para un mejor control del dolor.

pain-management.title: Non-Opioid Pain Medications
pain-management.scenario: You are introducing non-opioid medications as part of a multimodal pain management strategy.

samplePhrase.en: In addition to the opioid, we can use ibuprofen and a muscle relaxant to manage your pain better.
samplePhrase.es: Además del opioide, podemos usar ibuprofeno y un relajante muscular para controlar mejor su dolor.

pain-management.title: Physical Therapy and Exercise
pain-management.scenario: You are recommending physical therapy and specific exercises as part of pain management education.

samplePhrase.en: Physical therapy with stretching and strengthening exercises can help reduce your pain over time.
samplePhrase.es: La fisioterapia con estiramiento y ejercicios de fortalecimiento puede ayudar a reducir su dolor con el tiempo.

pain-management.title: Psychological and Behavioral Pain Management
pain-management.scenario: You are educating a patient about cognitive behavioral therapy, mindfulness, and psychological approaches to pain management.

samplePhrase.en: Mindfulness and relaxation techniques can help you better manage your pain emotions and improve your quality of life.
samplePhrase.es: Las técnicas de conciencia plena y relajación pueden ayudarle a controlar mejor sus emociones de dolor y mejorar su calidad de vida.

pain-management.title: Assessing Pain Severity
pain-management.scenario: A nurse uses the numeric pain scale to evaluate a patient's current pain level.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of 0 to 10, with 10 being the worst pain you've ever felt, how would you rate your pain right now?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala de 0 a 10, siendo 10 el peor dolor que ha sentido, ¿cómo calificaría su dolor ahora?

pain-management.title: Pain Location and Character
pain-management.scenario: A clinician asks a patient to describe the location, quality, and character of their pain.

samplePhrase.en: Can you describe the quality of your pain—is it sharp, dull, burning, or throbbing?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Puede describir la calidad de su dolor—es agudo, sordo, ardiente, o pulsante?

pain-management.title: Pain Duration and Onset
pain-management.scenario: A provider asks about when the pain started and how long it has persisted.

vocab.en: how long have you had it?

samplePhrase.en: How long have you been experiencing this pain—is it constant or does it come and go?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cuánto tiempo ha estado experimentando este dolor—¿es constante o va y viene?

pain-management.title: Factors Affecting Pain
pain-management.scenario: A clinician asks what makes the patient's pain better or worse.

samplePhrase.en: What activities or positions make your pain better or worse?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Qué actividades o posiciones hacen que su dolor mejore o empeore?

pain-management.title: Functional Impact Assessment
pain-management.scenario: A provider assesses how pain affects the patient's daily activities and quality of life.

samplePhrase.en: How has this pain affected your ability to work, sleep, or enjoy activities with family?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cómo ha afectado este dolor su capacidad para trabajar, dormir, o disfrutar actividades con la familia?

pain-management.title: Opioid Medication Basics
pain-management.scenario: A clinician educates a patient about opioid medications for pain management.

samplePhrase.en: This opioid medication will help control your pain, but it's important to take it exactly as prescribed.
samplePhrase.es: Esta medicación opioide ayudará a controlar su dolor, pero es importante tomarla exactamente como se prescribió.

pain-management.title: Opioid Dosing and Adjustment
pain-management.scenario: A provider discusses how opioid doses are adjusted based on pain control and tolerance.

samplePhrase.en: If your pain is not well controlled after one week, we may need to adjust your dose upward.
samplePhrase.es: Si su dolor no está bien controlado después de una semana, es posible que tengamos que aumentar su dosis.

pain-management.title: Opioid Side Effects
pain-management.scenario: A clinician discusses common side effects of opioid medications with a patient.

samplePhrase.en: The most common side effect is constipation, so we recommend drinking plenty of water and increasing fiber.
samplePhrase.es: El efecto secundario más común es el estreñimiento, por lo que recomendamos beber mucha agua e aumentar la fibra.

pain-management.title: Opioid Dependency and Addiction Screening
pain-management.scenario: A provider screens a patient for risk of opioid dependency and addiction.

samplePhrase.en: I need to ask you some questions about your personal and family history to assess your risk for addiction.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito hacerle algunas preguntas sobre su historial personal y familiar para evaluar su riesgo de adicción.

pain-management.title: Opioid Misuse Prevention
pain-management.scenario: A clinician educates a patient about safe opioid use and preventing misuse.

samplePhrase.en: It is very important that you take this medication exactly as prescribed and do not share it with anyone else.
samplePhrase.es: Es muy importante que tome esta medicación exactamente como se prescribió y no la comparta con nadie.

pain-management.title: Nerve Blocks: Introduction and Types
pain-management.scenario: A provider explains what a nerve block is and the different types available.

samplePhrase.en: A nerve block is an injection of numbing medication around a nerve to block pain signals.
samplePhrase.es: Un bloqueo nervioso es una inyección de medicación adormecedora alrededor de un nervio para bloquear las señales de dolor.

pain-management.title: Nerve Block Procedure and Recovery
pain-management.scenario: A clinician explains the nerve block procedure and what to expect during recovery.

samplePhrase.en: The procedure usually takes 15 to 30 minutes, and you should feel numbness within 10 to 20 minutes.
samplePhrase.es: El procedimiento generalmente toma de 15 a 30 minutos, y debería sentir adormecimiento dentro de 10 a 20 minutos.

pain-management.title: Multimodal Pain Management Strategy
pain-management.scenario: A provider discusses combining multiple pain management approaches for better control.

samplePhrase.en: We will combine several approaches—medication, physical therapy, and relaxation techniques—to manage your pain effectively.
samplePhrase.es: Combinaremos varios enfoques—medicación, terapia física, y técnicas de relajación—para manejar su dolor efectivamente.

pain-management.title: Patient Education and Pain Management Goals
pain-management.scenario: A clinician educates a patient about realistic pain management goals and self-care.

samplePhrase.en: Our goal is not to eliminate all pain, but to reduce it enough so you can participate in activities that matter to you.
samplePhrase.es: Nuestro objetivo no es eliminar todo el dolor, sino reducirlo lo suficiente para que pueda participar en actividades que le importan.

pain-management.title: Addiction Monitoring and Follow-up
pain-management.scenario: A provider discusses ongoing monitoring for opioid use and addiction risk during follow-up.

samplePhrase.en: We will monitor your use of opioid medication through regular urine tests and pill counts to ensure safe usage.
samplePhrase.es: Monitorearemos su uso de medicación opioide a través de pruebas regulares de orina y conteos de píldoras para garantizar un uso seguro.

medical-receptionist.title: Appointment Scheduling
medical-receptionist.scenario: A receptionist schedules a new patient appointment over the phone.

samplePhrase.en: Do you have availability next Tuesday at 2 PM?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Tiene disponibilidad el próximo martes a las 2 de la tarde?

medical-receptionist.title: Rescheduling an Appointment
medical-receptionist.scenario: A patient calls to change their existing appointment to a different date or time.

samplePhrase.en: I need to reschedule my appointment because of an emergency.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito reprogramar mi cita por una emergencia.

medical-receptionist.title: Insurance Verification
medical-receptionist.scenario: A receptionist verifies a patient's insurance coverage before their visit.

samplePhrase.en: May I please see your insurance card to verify your coverage?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Me permite ver su tarjeta de seguro para verificar su cobertura?

medical-receptionist.title: Copay Collection
medical-receptionist.scenario: A receptionist collects a patient's copayment at check-in.

samplePhrase.en: Your copay today is $25. Will you pay with cash or card?
samplePhrase.es: Su copago hoy es de $25. ¿Pagará en efectivo o tarjeta?

medical-receptionist.title: Insurance Referral Requests
medical-receptionist.scenario: A patient or provider requests a referral to a specialist covered by insurance.

samplePhrase.en: Your insurance requires a referral to see the cardiologist. Let me request that for you.
samplePhrase.es: Su seguro requiere una referencia para ver al cardiólogo. Permítame solicitar eso por usted.

medical-receptionist.title: Patient Check-in Forms
medical-receptionist.scenario: A receptionist explains that a patient needs to complete check-in paperwork.

samplePhrase.en: Please fill out these forms with your medical history and current medications.
samplePhrase.es: Por favor, complete estos formularios con su historial médico y medicamentos actuales.

medical-receptionist.title: Patient Check-out and Billing
medical-receptionist.scenario: A receptionist processes a patient's departure and explains any remaining charges.

samplePhrase.en: Before you leave, you have a remaining balance of $50. Would you like to set up a payment plan?
samplePhrase.es: Antes de partir, tiene un saldo pendiente de $50. ¿Le gustaría establecer un plan de pago?

medical-receptionist.title: Medical Records Requests
medical-receptionist.scenario: A patient or another provider requests copies of medical records from the clinic.

samplePhrase.en: To request your medical records, I need you to sign an authorization form.
samplePhrase.es: Para solicitar sus registros médicos, necesito que firme un formulario de autorización.

medical-receptionist.title: Confirming Patient Demographics
medical-receptionist.scenario: A receptionist verifies or updates a patient's personal information at check-in.

samplePhrase.en: Can you confirm that your phone number is still 555-1234?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Puede confirmar que su número de teléfono sigue siendo 555-1234?

medical-receptionist.title: Explaining Out-of-Pocket Costs
medical-receptionist.scenario: A receptionist informs a patient about costs not covered by their insurance.

samplePhrase.en: This service is not covered by your insurance, so you will be responsible for the full cost of $300.
samplePhrase.es: Este servicio no está cubierto por su seguro, por lo que usted será responsable del costo total de $300.

medical-receptionist.title: Handling Insurance Denials
medical-receptionist.scenario: A receptionist explains why an insurance claim was denied and discusses next steps.

samplePhrase.en: Your insurance denied this claim because it requires pre-authorization. We can help you appeal this decision.
samplePhrase.es: Su seguro denegó esta reclamación porque requiere preautorización. Podemos ayudarle a apelar esta decisión.

medical-receptionist.title: Phone Communication with Patients
medical-receptionist.scenario: A receptionist calls a patient to confirm an appointment or provide test results notification.

samplePhrase.en: Hello, I'm calling to confirm your appointment tomorrow at 10 AM.
samplePhrase.es: Hola, le llamo para confirmar su cita mañana a las 10 de la mañana.

medical-receptionist.title: Language Preference and Interpreter Services
medical-receptionist.scenario: A receptionist asks about a patient's preferred language and arranges interpreter support if needed.

samplePhrase.en: What is your preferred language for your medical visits? We can arrange an interpreter if needed.
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cuál es su idioma preferido para sus visitas médicas? Podemos arreglar un intérprete si es necesario.

medical-receptionist.title: Handling Patient Questions About Costs
medical-receptionist.scenario: A patient asks questions about charges, billing, or payment options during check-in or check-out.

samplePhrase.en: Can you explain the charges on my bill? What payment plans do you offer?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Puede explicar los cargos en mi factura? ¿Qué planes de pago ofrecen?

medical-receptionist.title: No-show Policy and Cancellation Procedures
medical-receptionist.scenario: A receptionist explains the clinic's no-show policy and cancellation procedures to a patient.

samplePhrase.en: Please remember that if you need to cancel, you must call at least 24 hours in advance to avoid a no-show fee.
samplePhrase.es: Por favor recuerde que si necesita cancelar, debe llamar con al menos 24 horas de anticipación para evitar una tarifa de inasistencia.

medical-receptionist.title: Scheduling Follow-up Appointments
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist books a follow-up visit after a patient's initial consultation.

vocab.en: we will send you a text
vocab.es: le enviaremos un mensaje de texto

samplePhrase.en: Your follow-up appointment is scheduled for next Thursday at 2 PM.
samplePhrase.es: Su cita de seguimiento está programada para el próximo jueves a las 2 de la tarde.

medical-receptionist.title: Verifying Insurance Coverage
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist verifies patient's insurance details before treatment.

samplePhrase.en: May I see your insurance card to verify your coverage?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Puedo ver su tarjeta de seguro para verificar su cobertura?

medical-receptionist.title: Explaining Copay Requirements
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist informs patient of copay amount due at visit.

samplePhrase.en: Your copay today is $25. How would you like to pay?
samplePhrase.es: Su copago hoy es de $25. ¿Cómo desea pagar?

medical-receptionist.title: Processing Referrals
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist explains referral requirements to a patient for specialist care.

samplePhrase.en: Your doctor has given you a referral to see the cardiologist. This authorization is valid for 30 days.
samplePhrase.es: Su médico le ha dado una referencia para ver al cardiólogo. Esta autorización es válida por 30 días.

medical-receptionist.title: Check-in Procedures
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist guides patient through electronic check-in process.

vocab.en: have a seat in the waiting area
vocab.es: tome asiento en la sala de espera

samplePhrase.en: Please check in at the tablet and verify that all your information is correct.
samplePhrase.es: Por favor, regístrese en la tableta y verifique que toda su información sea correcta.

medical-receptionist.title: Check-out and Billing
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist processes checkout and explains final billing.

samplePhrase.en: Your total bill is $150. We will send you an itemized statement in the mail.
samplePhrase.es: Su factura total es de $150. Le enviaremos un estado de cuenta detallado por correo.

medical-receptionist.title: Medical Records Requests
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist processes patient's request for medical records.

samplePhrase.en: I will need you to sign this release of information form so we can send your records to your new doctor.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitaré que firme este formulario de liberación de información para que podamos enviar sus registros a su nuevo médico.

medical-receptionist.title: Handling Insurance Denials
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist explains an insurance claim denial to the patient.

samplePhrase.en: Your insurance claim was denied because the procedure was deemed not medically necessary. You can file an appeal if you disagree.
samplePhrase.es: Su reclamación de seguros fue denegada porque el procedimiento se consideró no médicamente necesario. Puede presentar una apelación si no está de acuerdo.

medical-receptionist.title: Patient Communication: Appointment Reminders
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist sends appointment reminders via phone or text.

samplePhrase.en: This is a reminder that you have an appointment tomorrow at 10 AM. Please arrive 15 minutes early and bring your insurance card.
samplePhrase.es: Este es un recordatorio de que tiene una cita mañana a las 10 de la mañana. Por favor, llegue 15 minutos antes y traiga su tarjeta de seguro.

medical-receptionist.title: Handling No-Show Situations
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist addresses missed appointment with patient.

vocab.es: llame para confirmar la próxima vez

samplePhrase.en: You did not show up for your appointment yesterday. If you miss three appointments, you may be discharged from our practice.
samplePhrase.es: No se presentó a su cita ayer. Si falta a tres citas, puede ser despedido de nuestra práctica.

medical-receptionist.title: Managing Schedule Changes
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist helps patient reschedule an existing appointment.

samplePhrase.en: Would you like to reschedule your appointment? What time works best for you?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Le gustaría reprogramar su cita? ¿Qué hora le va mejor?

medical-receptionist.title: Verifying Patient Identity
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist confirms patient identity before providing health information.

samplePhrase.en: For security purposes, can you confirm your date of birth and address?
samplePhrase.es: Por razones de seguridad, ¿puede confirmar su fecha de nacimiento y dirección?

medical-receptionist.title: Explaining Out-of-Pocket Costs
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist breaks down costs not covered by insurance.

samplePhrase.en: This procedure is not covered by your insurance, so you will be responsible for the full cost of $2,000.
samplePhrase.es: Este procedimiento no está cubierto por su seguro, por lo que usted será responsable del costo total de $2,000.

medical-receptionist.title: Coordinating Care Between Providers
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist facilitates communication and records sharing between multiple physicians.

samplePhrase.en: We will send your medical records to the cardiologist so they have your complete medical history.
samplePhrase.es: Enviaremos sus registros médicos al cardiólogo para que tenga su historial médico completo.

medical-receptionist.title: Documenting Special Requests and Accommodations
medical-receptionist.scenario: Receptionist records patient preferences and accessibility needs in chart.

samplePhrase.en: I see that you requested a Spanish interpreter. I have noted this in your chart, and the interpreter will be present at your appointment.
samplePhrase.es: Veo que solicitó un intérprete en español. He anotado esto en su gráfico, e el intérprete estará presente en su cita.

social-work.title: Housing Assessment
social-work.scenario: Social worker assesses patient's current housing stability and living conditions.

samplePhrase.en: Do you have a safe place to sleep tonight?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Tiene un lugar seguro para dormir esta noche?

social-work.title: Food Security Screening
social-work.scenario: Social worker screens patient for food insecurity and nutritional needs.

samplePhrase.en: Are you able to afford enough food for your family?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Puede permitirse suficiente comida para su familia?

social-work.title: Employment and Income Evaluation
social-work.scenario: Social worker evaluates patient's employment status and income sources.

samplePhrase.en: What is your current employment status?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cuál es su estado laboral actual?

social-work.title: Transportation Barriers
social-work.scenario: Social worker assesses patient's ability to access healthcare appointments.

samplePhrase.en: How will you get to your medical appointments?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cómo llegará a sus citas médicas?

social-work.title: Childcare and Dependent Care
social-work.scenario: Social worker identifies childcare needs and family support systems.

samplePhrase.en: Who takes care of your children while you work?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Quién cuida a sus hijos mientras trabaja?

social-work.title: Insurance Coverage Review
social-work.scenario: Social worker reviews patient's current insurance status and eligibility.

samplePhrase.en: Do you currently have health insurance?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Tiene seguro de salud actualmente?

social-work.title: Medication Access and Affordability
social-work.scenario: Social worker addresses patient barriers to obtaining medications.

samplePhrase.en: Are you able to afford your medications?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Puede permitirse sus medicamentos?

social-work.title: Discharge Planning Basics
social-work.scenario: Social worker initiates discharge planning and post-hospital care coordination.

samplePhrase.en: We need to plan for your care after you leave the hospital.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos planificar su cuidado después de que salga del hospital.

social-work.title: Mental Health Screening
social-work.scenario: Social worker screens patient for depression, anxiety, and psychological distress.

samplePhrase.en: Have you been feeling sad or hopeless lately?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Ha estado sintiendo tristeza o desesperanza últimamente?

social-work.title: Substance Use Assessment
social-work.scenario: Social worker assesses patient's substance use and addiction support needs.

samplePhrase.en: Have you ever struggled with alcohol or drug use?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Alguna vez ha tenido problemas con el alcohol o las drogas?

social-work.title: Domestic Violence Screening
social-work.scenario: Social worker screens for intimate partner violence and provides safety planning.

samplePhrase.en: Have you ever felt unsafe in your relationship?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Alguna vez se ha sentido inseguro en su relación?

social-work.title: Suicidal Ideation and Crisis Response
social-work.scenario: Social worker responds to patient expressing suicidal thoughts.

samplePhrase.en: Are you thinking about hurting yourself?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Está pensando en hacerse daño?

social-work.title: Community Resource Navigation
social-work.scenario: Social worker connects patient with local community resources and services.

samplePhrase.en: I can help you connect with resources in your community.
samplePhrase.es: Puedo ayudarle a conectar con recursos en su comunidad.

social-work.title: Chronic Disease Self-Management
social-work.scenario: Social worker supports patient in managing chronic illness and lifestyle changes.

vocab.es: cambios en el estilo de vida

samplePhrase.en: What challenges do you face managing your condition at home?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Qué desafíos enfrenta al controlar su condición en el hogar?

social-work.title: Health Literacy and Cultural Sensitivity
social-work.scenario: Social worker ensures patient understanding and respects cultural values in care planning.

samplePhrase.en: Do you have any concerns about the treatment plan we discussed?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Tiene alguna preocupación sobre el plan de tratamiento que discutimos?

social-work.title: Housing Instability Assessment
social-work.scenario: Social worker assesses patient's current living situation and housing stability.

samplePhrase.en: I want to help you find safe housing. Can you tell me about where you're living now?
samplePhrase.es: Quiero ayudarle a encontrar una vivienda segura. ¿Puede decirme dónde está viviendo ahora?

social-work.title: Food Security & Nutrition
social-work.scenario: Social worker evaluates patient's access to food and nutritional needs.

samplePhrase.en: Are you able to afford enough food for your family each month?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Puede permitirse suficiente comida para su familia cada mes?

social-work.title: Transportation Barriers
social-work.scenario: Social worker addresses patient's difficulties accessing medical appointments due to transportation.

samplePhrase.en: How do you get to your medical appointments? Are you having trouble with transportation?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cómo llega a sus citas médicas? ¿Tiene dificultades con el transporte?

social-work.title: Medication Access & Adherence
social-work.scenario: Social worker identifies barriers to medication access and affordability.

samplePhrase.en: Do you have difficulty affording your medications? I can help you find assistance programs.
samplePhrase.es: ¿Tiene dificultades para pagar sus medicamentos? Puedo ayudarle a encontrar programas de asistencia.

social-work.title: Childcare & Family Support
social-work.scenario: Social worker assesses childcare needs and family support systems.

samplePhrase.en: Do you have reliable childcare while you attend your medical appointments?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Tiene cuidado confiable de niños mientras asiste a sus citas médicas?

social-work.title: Employment & Income Support
social-work.scenario: Social worker evaluates patient's employment status and income stability.

vocab.es: crédito tributario por ingresos del trabajo

samplePhrase.en: Tell me about your current employment. Are you facing any financial hardship?
samplePhrase.es: Cuénteme sobre su empleo actual. ¿Está enfrentando alguna dificultad financiera?

social-work.title: Insurance Navigation Basics
social-work.scenario: Social worker helps patient understand health insurance options and enrollment.

samplePhrase.en: Do you currently have health insurance? I can help you apply if you don't.
samplePhrase.es: ¿Actualmente tiene seguro de salud? Puedo ayudarle a solicitar si no lo tiene.

social-work.title: Mental Health Screening & Referral
social-work.scenario: Social worker screens patient for depression, anxiety, or other mental health concerns.

samplePhrase.en: How are you feeling emotionally? Have you experienced sadness or worry that interferes with daily life?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cómo se siente emocionalmente? ¿Ha experimentado tristeza o preocupación que interfiera con la vida diaria?

social-work.title: Substance Use Assessment
social-work.scenario: Social worker assesses patient's alcohol and drug use in a non-judgmental manner.

samplePhrase.en: I'm asking about alcohol and drug use to better support your health. Your answers are confidential.
samplePhrase.es: Le pregunto sobre el consumo de alcohol y drogas para apoyar mejor su salud. Sus respuestas son confidenciales.

social-work.title: Domestic Violence & Safety Planning
social-work.scenario: Social worker identifies signs of intimate partner violence and develops safety plan.

samplePhrase.en: I'm asking about your safety. Has anyone hurt you or made you feel unsafe at home?
samplePhrase.es: Le pregunto sobre su seguridad. ¿Alguien le ha lastimado o hecho sentir inseguro en casa?

social-work.title: Suicidal Ideation & Crisis Response
social-work.scenario: Social worker assesses suicide risk and initiates crisis intervention protocol.

samplePhrase.en: Have you had thoughts about harming yourself? I want to help keep you safe.
samplePhrase.es: ¿Ha tenido pensamientos sobre lastimarse? Quiero ayudarle a mantenerse seguro.

social-work.title: Discharge Planning Overview
social-work.scenario: Social worker initiates discharge planning process for hospitalized patient.

vocab.es: servicios de salud en el hogar

samplePhrase.en: Let's plan for your discharge from the hospital. We'll arrange services to help you at home.
samplePhrase.es: Planifiquemos su alta del hospital. Organizaremos servicios para ayudarle en casa.

social-work.title: Community Resource Referrals
social-work.scenario: Social worker connects patient with local community organizations and services.

samplePhrase.en: Based on your needs, I'm referring you to several community resources that can help.
samplePhrase.es: Según sus necesidades, le estoy derivando a varios recursos comunitarios que pueden ayudar.

social-work.title: Education & Health Literacy
social-work.scenario: Social worker assesses and improves patient's understanding of health conditions and self-management.

samplePhrase.en: I want to make sure you understand how to manage your condition. Let me explain this in a way that makes sense.
samplePhrase.es: Quiero asegurarme de que entiende cómo manejar su condición. Permítame explicarle de una manera que tenga sentido.

social-work.title: Transition & Follow-Up Care Coordination
social-work.scenario: Social worker coordinates continuity of care and ensures patient has support post-discharge.

samplePhrase.en: We'll make sure you have all the appointments and support you need after you leave the hospital. I'll help coordinate everything.
samplePhrase.es: Nos aseguraremos de que tenga todas las citas y apoyo que necesita después de salir del hospital. Ayudaré a coordinar todo.

or-evs.title: Sterile Field Setup
or-evs.scenario: A surgical nurse prepares the sterile field before an orthopedic procedure.

samplePhrase.en: Please do not touch the sterile field—keep your hands back six inches.
samplePhrase.es: Por favor, no toque el campo estéril—mantenga las manos atrás seis pulgadas.

or-evs.title: Instrument Identification and Handling
or-evs.scenario: An EVS technician learns to handle surgical instruments during room turnover.

samplePhrase.en: Handle all sharp instruments with both hands and watch for needles.
samplePhrase.es: Manipule todos los instrumentos punzantes con ambas manos y tenga cuidado con las agujas.

or-evs.title: Room Turnover Basics
or-evs.scenario: A surgical technician prepares the operating room between two cases.

samplePhrase.en: We need to complete the room turnover in twenty minutes for the next patient.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos completar el cambio de quirófano en veinte minutos para el próximo paciente.

or-evs.title: Biohazard Identification
or-evs.scenario: A healthcare worker identifies and segregates biohazardous materials after surgery.

samplePhrase.en: All blood-soaked materials must go into the red biohazard bag immediately.
samplePhrase.es: Todos los materiales empapados en sangre deben ir a la bolsa roja de peligro biológico inmediatamente.

or-evs.title: Sharps Safety and Disposal
or-evs.scenario: A nurse safely manages needles and sharp instruments to prevent needlestick injuries.

samplePhrase.en: Never recap needles by hand—place all sharps directly into the sharps container.
samplePhrase.es: Nunca vuelva a tapar agujas con la mano—coloque todos los objetos punzantes directamente en el recipiente para objetos punzantes.

or-evs.title: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) Donning
or-evs.scenario: A surgical technician puts on PPE before entering the sterile surgical area.

samplePhrase.en: Put on your mask first, then your hair cover, gown, and gloves in order.
samplePhrase.es: Póngase la mascarilla primero, luego la cobertura para el cabello, la bata y los guantes en orden.

or-evs.title: Hand Hygiene Protocol
or-evs.scenario: A healthcare worker performs hand hygiene before patient contact in the OR.

samplePhrase.en: Scrub your hands and forearms with soap and water for five minutes before entering the OR.
samplePhrase.es: Lave sus manos y antebrazos con jabón y agua durante cinco minutos antes de entrar al quirófano.

or-evs.title: Sterile Technique Violations
or-evs.scenario: A supervisor corrects a technician who has broken sterile technique during instrument setup.

samplePhrase.en: Stop—that item touched the non-sterile area. We need to start the setup over.
samplePhrase.es: Pare—ese artículo tocó el área no estéril. Necesitamos comenzar la preparación de nuevo.

or-evs.title: Equipment Cleaning and Decontamination
or-evs.scenario: An EVS worker cleans and decontaminates surgical equipment after a procedure.

samplePhrase.en: Soak the instruments in enzymatic cleaner for ten minutes, then scrub and rinse thoroughly.
samplePhrase.es: Remoje los instrumentos en limpiador enzimático durante diez minutos, luego frote y enjuague completamente.

or-evs.title: Infection Control Precautions
or-evs.scenario: A surgical team reviews standard precautions before an orthopedic surgery.

samplePhrase.en: This patient requires contact precautions, so wear gloves, gown, and mask throughout the procedure.
samplePhrase.es: Este paciente requiere precauciones de contacto, así que use guantes, bata y mascarilla durante todo el procedimiento.

or-evs.title: Instrument Inspection Before Use
or-evs.scenario: A surgical nurse inspects instruments for damage or defects before a procedure.

samplePhrase.en: Check each instrument for rust, dull edges, and proper function before we use it.
samplePhrase.es: Verifique cada instrumento por óxido, bordes opacos y funcionamiento adecuado antes de usarlo.

or-evs.title: Spill Cleanup and Disinfection
or-evs.scenario: A technician cleans up blood and fluid spills during emergency room turnover.

samplePhrase.en: Use absorbent material to contain the blood spill, then disinfect with bleach solution for ten minutes.
samplePhrase.es: Use material absorbente para contener el derrame de sangre, luego desinfecte con solución de cloro durante diez minutos.

or-evs.title: Environmental Surface Cleaning
or-evs.scenario: An EVS technician cleans and disinfects surfaces in the operating room.

samplePhrase.en: Wipe all high-touch surfaces, including doorknobs and light switches, with EPA-approved disinfectant.
samplePhrase.es: Limpie todas las superficies de alto contacto, incluidos los pomos de puerta e interruptores de luz, con desinfectante aprobado por EPA.

or-evs.title: Waste Segregation and Labeling
or-evs.scenario: A healthcare worker segregates different types of medical waste for proper disposal.

samplePhrase.en: Label each biohazard bag with the date, time, and your department name before sealing it.
samplePhrase.es: Etiquete cada bolsa de peligro biológico con la fecha, hora y nombre de su departamento antes de sellarla.

or-evs.title: Sterilization Process Overview
or-evs.scenario: A surgical technician loads instruments into the sterilizer and monitors the cycle.

samplePhrase.en: Make sure the sterilizer reaches 250 degrees Fahrenheit at 30 PSI for the full cycle time.
samplePhrase.es: Asegúrese de que el esterilizador alcance 250 grados Fahrenheit a 30 PSI durante el tiempo completo del ciclo.

or-evs.title: Sterile Field Setup
or-evs.scenario: OR nurse prepares the sterile field and instrumentation table before surgery begins.

samplePhrase.en: Do not touch the sterile field with your bare hands.
samplePhrase.es: No toque el campo estéril con las manos desnudas.

or-evs.title: Instrument Identification and Handling
or-evs.scenario: Surgical technician identifies and handles delicate instruments during case setup.

samplePhrase.en: Pass me the forceps carefully; the tip is very delicate.
samplePhrase.es: Pásame las pinzas con cuidado; la punta es muy delicada.

or-evs.title: Sharps Safety and Needlestick Prevention
or-evs.scenario: Healthcare worker manages sharp instruments and needles to prevent injury.

samplePhrase.en: Always use the hands-free technique when passing sharps.
samplePhrase.es: Siempre usa la técnica sin contacto de manos al pasar objetos cortantes.

or-evs.title: Instrument Cleaning and Decontamination
or-evs.scenario: Central sterile processing technician cleans and decontaminates surgical instruments.

samplePhrase.en: Soak the instruments in enzymatic cleaner for at least 10 minutes.
samplePhrase.es: Remoja los instrumentos en limpiador enzimático durante al menos 10 minutos.

or-evs.title: Sterilization Process Monitoring
or-evs.scenario: Staff monitors sterilization cycles and validates sterile instrument packages.

samplePhrase.en: Check the biological indicator to confirm the sterilization cycle was successful.
samplePhrase.es: Verifica el indicador biológico para confirmar que el ciclo de esterilización fue exitoso.

or-evs.title: Biohazard Classification and Segregation
or-evs.scenario: Worker segregates different types of biohazardous waste during room cleanup.

samplePhrase.en: Place all contaminated materials in the red bag for biohazard disposal.
samplePhrase.es: Coloca todos los materiales contaminados en la bolsa roja para desecho de peligros biológicos.

or-evs.title: Bloodborne Pathogen Exposure Protocols
or-evs.scenario: Staff responds immediately after a potential bloodborne pathogen exposure incident.

vocab.es: norma de patógenos transmitidos por sangre

samplePhrase.en: Report any exposure incident to occupational health immediately.
samplePhrase.es: Reporta cualquier incidente de exposición a salud ocupacional inmediatamente.

or-evs.title: Personal Protective Equipment in the OR
or-evs.scenario: Surgical team dons appropriate PPE before entering the sterile field.

samplePhrase.en: Everyone must don full PPE before entering the operating room.
samplePhrase.es: Todos deben ponerse el EPP completo antes de entrar al quirófano.

or-evs.title: Hand Hygiene and Surgical Scrubbing
or-evs.scenario: Surgical staff performs proper hand hygiene and surgical scrub procedure.

samplePhrase.en: Scrub your hands and forearms for at least three minutes with antiseptic soap.
samplePhrase.es: Lávate las manos y antebrazos durante al menos tres minutos con jabón antiséptico.

or-evs.title: Environmental Surface Disinfection
or-evs.scenario: Housekeeping staff disinfects OR surfaces between surgical cases.

samplePhrase.en: Allow the disinfectant to remain on the surface for the required contact time.
samplePhrase.es: Deja que el desinfectante permanezca en la superficie durante el tiempo de contacto requerido.

or-evs.title: Room Turnover Procedures
or-evs.scenario: OR team performs rapid and thorough room turnover between consecutive surgical cases.

samplePhrase.en: We need to complete the room turnover in 15 minutes for the next surgical case.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos completar la reorganización de la sala en 15 minutos para el próximo caso quirúrgico.

or-evs.title: Specimen Handling and Chain of Custody
or-evs.scenario: Staff properly handles surgical specimens and maintains chain of custody documentation.

samplePhrase.en: Label the specimen container with the patient identification and place it in formalin.
samplePhrase.es: Etiqueta el recipiente del espécimen con la identificación del paciente y colócalo en formalina.

or-evs.title: Infection Control Audit and Compliance
or-evs.scenario: Infection prevention specialist conducts rounds to audit OR compliance with infection control standards.

samplePhrase.en: We identified a compliance issue; please follow the correct infection control procedure.
samplePhrase.es: Identificamos un problema de cumplimiento; por favor sigue el procedimiento correcto de control de infecciones.

or-evs.title: Equipment Maintenance and Safety Checks
or-evs.scenario: Biomedical technician performs preventive maintenance and safety checks on OR equipment.

samplePhrase.en: Tag this equipment as out of service until maintenance is completed.
samplePhrase.es: Etiqueta este equipo como fuera de servicio hasta que se complete el mantenimiento.

or-evs.title: Incident Reporting and Quality Improvement
or-evs.scenario: Staff reports a near-miss incident and participates in quality improvement discussion.

samplePhrase.en: Complete an incident report for any near-miss events in the operating room.
samplePhrase.es: Completa un reporte del incidente para cualquier casi accidente en el quirófano.

fmg.title: First Day Orientation
fmg.scenario: A new FMG resident arrives for their first day and needs to understand basic hospital orientation instructions.

samplePhrase.en: Welcome to the hospital. Let me show you where the break room is.
samplePhrase.es: Bienvenido al hospital. Déjame mostrarte dónde está la sala de descanso.

fmg.title: Patient Registration and History
fmg.scenario: A resident is taking a patient's demographic information and basic medical history at intake.

samplePhrase.en: I need to ask you about your past medical history and current medications.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito preguntarte sobre tus antecedentes médicos y medicamentos actuales.

fmg.title: Physical Examination Instructions
fmg.scenario: A resident is instructing a patient on positioning and movements during a physical exam.

vocab.en: let me know if it hurts

samplePhrase.en: Please lie down on the examination table and take a deep breath.
samplePhrase.es: Por favor, acuéstate en la camilla de examen y respira profundo.

fmg.title: Vital Signs Assessment
fmg.scenario: A resident is explaining to a patient how vital signs will be measured.

samplePhrase.en: I'm going to check your blood pressure and temperature now.
samplePhrase.es: Voy a verificar tu presión arterial y temperatura ahora.

fmg.title: Symptom Assessment
fmg.scenario: A resident is asking a patient detailed questions about their symptoms.

samplePhrase.en: On a scale of one to ten, how severe is your pain?
samplePhrase.es: En una escala del uno al diez, ¿qué tan severo es tu dolor?

fmg.title: Diagnostic Testing Orders
fmg.scenario: A resident is explaining to a patient why certain tests are being ordered.

samplePhrase.en: I need to order a blood test and chest X-ray to help diagnose your condition.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito ordenar un análisis de sangre y una radiografía de tórax para ayudar a diagnosticar tu condición.

fmg.title: Treatment Plan Discussion
fmg.scenario: A resident is explaining the proposed treatment plan to a patient.

samplePhrase.en: We will start you on antibiotics three times a day for ten days.
samplePhrase.es: Vamos a empezar antibióticos tres veces al día durante diez días.

fmg.title: Clinical Documentation Basics
fmg.scenario: A resident is learning to document a patient encounter in the electronic health record.

samplePhrase.en: I need to document your findings in the patient's medical record.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito documentar tus hallazgos en el registro médico del paciente.

fmg.title: Team Communication in Clinical Setting
fmg.scenario: A resident is introducing themselves to the nursing and healthcare team at shift start.

samplePhrase.en: Hi everyone, I'm Dr. [Name], the new resident on this team.
samplePhrase.es: Hola a todos, soy la Dra. [Nombre], la nueva residente en este equipo.

fmg.title: Rounds and Case Presentation
fmg.scenario: A resident is presenting a patient case during morning rounds.

samplePhrase.en: This is a 45-year-old male admitted yesterday with pneumonia. His vital signs are now stable.
samplePhrase.es: Este es un hombre de 45 años ingresado ayer con neumonía. Sus signos vitales ahora están estables.

fmg.title: Medication Administration
fmg.scenario: A resident is coordinating with nursing to administer medications to a patient.

samplePhrase.en: Please give this patient the IV antibiotic slowly over thirty minutes.
samplePhrase.es: Por favor, administra el antibiótico intravenoso lentamente durante treinta minutos.

fmg.title: Patient Safety and Infection Control
fmg.scenario: A resident is reviewing safety protocols with nursing staff.

samplePhrase.en: Remember to wear gloves and wash your hands between patients.
samplePhrase.es: Recuerda usar guantes y lavar tus manos entre pacientes.

fmg.title: Discharge Planning and Instructions
fmg.scenario: A resident is preparing discharge instructions for a patient being sent home.

samplePhrase.en: Make sure to take your medications as prescribed and return if you have fever or shortness of breath.
samplePhrase.es: Asegúrate de tomar tus medicamentos según lo prescrito y regresa si tienes fiebre o dificultad para respirar.

fmg.title: US Medical Culture and Expectations
fmg.scenario: A new FMG resident is learning about American medical culture and workplace norms.

samplePhrase.en: In the US, we emphasize shared decision-making where the patient has significant input in their treatment plan.
samplePhrase.es: En los EE.UU., enfatizamos la toma de decisiones compartida donde el paciente tiene una participación significativa en su plan de tratamiento.

fmg.title: Difficult Conversations and Bad News
fmg.scenario: A resident is learning how to communicate difficult diagnoses or prognosis to a patient.

samplePhrase.en: I have some difficult news to share with you. Let's discuss your treatment options and what's most important to you.
samplePhrase.es: Tengo noticias difíciles que compartir contigo. Hablemos sobre tus opciones de tratamiento y lo que es más importante para ti.

fmg.title: Admission Assessment
fmg.scenario: A senior resident admits a Spanish-speaking patient to the hospital and must document initial vital signs and chief complaint.

samplePhrase.en: I need to document your vital signs and review your medical history.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito registrar sus signos vitales y revisar sus antecedentes médicos.

fmg.title: Medication Reconciliation
fmg.scenario: A fellow must reconcile medications during a patient handoff to prevent drug interactions or duplication.

samplePhrase.en: Let me confirm all your medications to make sure there are no interactions.
samplePhrase.es: Déjeme confirmar todos sus medicamentos para asegurarme de que no haya interacciones.

fmg.title: Informed Consent
fmg.scenario: A resident must explain a procedure and obtain written informed consent from a Spanish-speaking patient.

samplePhrase.en: I will explain the procedure, its risks and benefits, and answer any questions you have.
samplePhrase.es: Le explicaré el procedimiento, sus riesgos y beneficios, y responderé cualquier pregunta que tenga.

fmg.title: Progress Note Documentation
fmg.scenario: A resident writes a daily progress note using the SOAP format for a Spanish-speaking patient's chart.

samplePhrase.en: Today the patient reports improved symptoms and vital signs are stable.
samplePhrase.es: Hoy el paciente reporta síntomas mejorados y los signos vitales están estables.

fmg.title: Discharge Planning
fmg.scenario: A resident discusses discharge instructions, follow-up appointments, and medication refills with a Spanish-speaking patient.

samplePhrase.en: You can go home today. Please follow up with your doctor in one week.
samplePhrase.es: Puede irse a casa hoy. Por favor, haga un seguimiento con su médico en una semana.

fmg.title: Difficult Conversations—Bad News
fmg.scenario: A fellow must deliver a poor diagnosis or adverse outcome to a Spanish-speaking patient with compassion.

samplePhrase.en: I have difficult news to share. The biopsy shows cancer, but there are treatment options available.
samplePhrase.es: Tengo noticias difíciles que compartir. La biopsia muestra cáncer, pero hay opciones de tratamiento disponibles.

fmg.title: Rounds Presentation
fmg.scenario: A resident presents a patient case to the attending physician and team during morning rounds.

samplePhrase.en: This is a 52-year-old Spanish-speaking patient admitted with chest pain; our differential includes ACS and pneumonia.
samplePhrase.es: Este es un paciente hispanohablante de 52 años ingresado con dolor en el pecho; nuestro diagnóstico diferencial incluye síndrome coronario agudo y neumonía.

fmg.title: Handoff Communication
fmg.scenario: A resident hands off a patient to the night team using SBAR format to ensure clear communication.

samplePhrase.en: Situation: The patient is stable. Background: admitted for pneumonia. Assessment: improving on antibiotics. Recommendation: continue current plan.
samplePhrase.es: Situación: El paciente está estable. Antecedentes: ingresado por neumonía. Evaluación: mejorando con antibióticos. Recomendación: continuar el plan actual.

fmg.title: Consultation Request
fmg.scenario: A resident calls a specialist to request a consultation and must communicate the clinical question clearly.

samplePhrase.en: I need a cardiology consult for a patient with acute chest pain and elevated troponin.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito una consulta de cardiología para un paciente con dolor torácico agudo y troponina elevada.

fmg.title: Addressing Treatment Refusal
fmg.scenario: A resident must discuss with a Spanish-speaking patient who refuses a recommended treatment or test.

samplePhrase.en: I understand you don't want the surgery. Can we discuss the risks and explore other options?
samplePhrase.es: Entiendo que no quiere la cirugía. ¿Podemos discutir los riesgos y explorar otras opciones?

fmg.title: Team Communication During Crisis
fmg.scenario: During a code or acute decompensation, a resident must communicate quickly and clearly with the healthcare team.

samplePhrase.en: Code blue—start compressions. I need a defibrillator and IV access immediately.
samplePhrase.es: Código azul—iniciar compresiones. Necesito un desfibrilador y acceso IV inmediatamente.

fmg.title: Culture and Health Beliefs
fmg.scenario: A resident encounters a Spanish-speaking patient with traditional health beliefs and must respect cultural differences while providing care.

samplePhrase.en: I respect your beliefs. Tell me about any remedies you're using so we can ensure they don't interfere with your treatment.
samplePhrase.es: Respeto sus creencias. Cuénteme sobre cualquier remedio que esté usando para que podamos asegurar que no interfieran con su tratamiento.

fmg.title: Documentation of Social Determinants
fmg.scenario: A resident documents social determinants of health (housing, food, transportation) in a Spanish-speaking patient's chart.

samplePhrase.en: Do you have stable housing and enough food to eat? This helps me understand barriers to your care.
samplePhrase.es: ¿Tiene una vivienda estable y suficiente comida para comer? Esto me ayuda a entender las barreras para su atención.

fmg.title: Family Meeting Coordination
fmg.scenario: A fellow coordinates a family meeting with Spanish-speaking family members to discuss goals of care and advance directives.

samplePhrase.en: We want to discuss what kind of care your loved one would want if things get worse.
samplePhrase.es: Queremos discutir qué tipo de atención le gustaría a su ser querido si las cosas empeoran.

fmg.title: Residency Program Expectations
fmg.scenario: A program director orients Spanish-speaking fellows to US residency culture, expectations, and professionalism standards.

samplePhrase.en: Residency in the US requires adapting to a collaborative team culture, duty hour restrictions, and high standards of professionalism.
samplePhrase.es: La residencia en EE. UU. requiere adaptarse a una cultura de equipo colaborativo, restricciones de horas de servicio y altos estándares de profesionalismo.
